CREATE VIEW dbo.[>18]
AS
SELECT     *
FROM         dbo.MEMBER_CHILD
WHERE     (MEMBER_TITLE <> N'جد') AND (MEMBER_TITLE <> N'جده') AND (MEMBER_TITLE <> 'الزوجة') AND (alarm = 1) AND (translated = 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.[123]
AS
SELECT     BankID, BankName
FROM         dbo.BanksData

CREATE VIEW dbo.[12X]
AS
SELECT     ID
FROM         dbo.AssetType

CREATE VIEW dbo.xyz
AS
SELECT     SUM(DEV_Value1) AS DebitValue, SUM(DEV_Value2) AS CreditValue, Account_Code, Account_Name, Account_Serial, Account_NameEng, opening_balance, 
                      opening_balance_type
FROM         (SELECT     DEV_Value1 = CASE WHEN Credit_Or_Debit = 0 THEN DEV_Value * 1 ELSE 0 END, 
                                              DEV_Value2 = CASE WHEN Credit_Or_Debit = 1 THEN DEV_Value * 1 ELSE 0 END, Account_Code, Account_Name, Account_Serial, opening_balance, 
                                              opening_balance_type, Account_NameEng, Parent_Account_Code
                        FROM         dbo.RptLedger_Sub) XTable
GROUP BY Account_Code, Account_Name, Account_Serial, Account_NameEng, opening_balance, opening_balance_type

CREATE VIEW dbo.adox
AS
SELECT   TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.TblAqarCommissions.ID, dbo.TblAqarCommissions.PymentNo, dbo.TblAqarCommissions.TypeOper, dbo.TblAqarCommissions.FilterNo, dbo.TblAqarCommissions.NoteID, dbo.TblAqarCommissions.TypeAmount, dbo.TblAqarCommissions.Remarks, dbo.TblAqarCommissions.ReVal, 
             dbo.TblAqarCommissions.Canceel, dbo.TblAqarCommissions.Amount, dbo.TblAqarCommissions.Crosses, dbo.TblAqarCommissions.ContNo, dbo.TblAqarCommissions.Flage, dbo.TblAqarCommissions.IqarID, dbo.TblAqarCommissions.EmpID, dbo.TblAqarDetai.unitno, dbo.TblAkarUnit.name, dbo.TblAkarUnit.namee, 
             dbo.TblAqarDetai.Aqarid, dbo.TblAqar.aqarname, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Code, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name1, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name2, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name3, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name4, dbo.TblEmployee.Fullcode, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Namee4, 
             dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Namee3, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Namee2, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Namee1, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Namee, dbo.Notes.NoteDate, dbo.Notes.NoteSerial, dbo.Notes.NoteSerial1, dbo.Notes.NoteDateH, dbo.Notes.branch_no, dbo.TblBranchesData.branch_name, dbo.TblBranchesData.branch_namee, 
             dbo.Notes.CusID, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.TblCustemers.CusNamee, dbo.TblAqrEarnest.CoustomerName, dbo.TBLSalesRepData.GroupID, dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.name AS Expr1, dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.namee AS Expr2, dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.Rent, dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.InternalComm, 
             dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.ExternalComm, dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.Revenue, dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.TypeiD, dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.Rent1, dbo.Notes.Note_Value2, dbo.Notes.Note_Value, dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.InternalComm1, dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.ExternalComm1, dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.Count, 
             dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.DMY, dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.Revenuee, dbo.Notes.ManulaNO, dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.Revenuee1, dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.GCom, dbo.Notes.ChqueNum, dbo.Notes.DueDate, dbo.Notes.Remark
FROM     dbo.TblEmployee RIGHT OUTER JOIN
             dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups RIGHT OUTER JOIN
             dbo.Notes LEFT OUTER JOIN
             dbo.TblAqrEarnest ON dbo.Notes.NoteID = dbo.TblAqrEarnest.NoteID LEFT OUTER JOIN
             dbo.TblCustemers ON dbo.Notes.CusID = dbo.TblCustemers.CusID LEFT OUTER JOIN
             dbo.TblBranchesData ON dbo.Notes.branch_no = dbo.TblBranchesData.branch_id RIGHT OUTER JOIN
             dbo.TBLSalesRepData RIGHT OUTER JOIN
             dbo.TblAqarCommissions ON dbo.TBLSalesRepData.EmpID = dbo.TblAqarCommissions.EmpID ON dbo.Notes.NoteID = dbo.TblAqarCommissions.NoteID LEFT OUTER JOIN
             dbo.TblAqar RIGHT OUTER JOIN
             dbo.TblAqarDetai ON dbo.TblAqar.Aqarid = dbo.TblAqarDetai.Aqarid LEFT OUTER JOIN
             dbo.TblAkarUnit ON dbo.TblAqarDetai.unittype = dbo.TblAkarUnit.id ON dbo.TblAqarCommissions.IqarID = dbo.TblAqarDetai.Id ON dbo.TBLSalesRepGroups.id = dbo.TBLSalesRepData.GroupID ON dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID = dbo.TBLSalesRepData.EmpID
WHERE   (1 = 1) AND (dbo.Notes.NoteDate >= '01-Jan-2026') AND (dbo.Notes.NoteDate <= '31-Mar-2026')

CREATE VIEW dbo.Balance_sheet_new
AS
SELECT     SUM(DEV_Value1) AS DebitValue, SUM(DEV_Value2) AS CreditValue, Account_Code, Account_Name, Account_Serial, Account_NameEng, last_Account, 
                      parent_Account_Code
FROM         (SELECT     DEV_Value1 = CASE WHEN Credit_Or_Debit = 0 THEN DEV_Value * 1 ELSE 0 END, 
                                              DEV_Value2 = CASE WHEN Credit_Or_Debit = 1 THEN DEV_Value * 1 ELSE 0 END, dbo.Accounts.Account_Code, dbo.Accounts.Account_Name, 
                                              dbo.Accounts.account_serial, dbo.Accounts.Account_NameEng, dbo.Accounts.Parent_Account_Code, dbo.Accounts.last_account
                        FROM         dbo.RptLedger_Sub RIGHT JOIN
                                              dbo.Accounts ON dbo.RptLedger_Sub.Account_Code = dbo.Accounts.Account_Code) XTable
WHERE     (Account_Code LIKE 'a1%' OR
                      Account_Code LIKE 'a2%')
GROUP BY Account_Code, Account_Name, Account_Serial, Account_NameEng, last_Account, Parent_Account_Code

create view BalanceSheetViewAccountsQry as  SELECT     dbo.ACCOUNTS.Account_Code, dbo.ACCOUNTS.Account_Name, dbo.ACCOUNTS.Branch, dbo.ACCOUNTS.Parent_Account_Code, dbo.ACCOUNTS.last_account,  dbo.ACCOUNTS.cannot_del, dbo.ACCOUNTS.Account_Serial, dbo.ACCOUNTS.Account_NameEng, dbo.BalanceSheetViewAccounts.Account_Code AS Account_CodeB ,BalanceSheetViewAccounts.BalanceSheetId  FROM         dbo.BalanceSheetViewAccounts INNER JOIN dbo.ACCOUNTS ON dbo.BalanceSheetViewAccounts.Account_Code = dbo.ACCOUNTS.Account_Code

CREATE VIEW dbo.CahingReport
AS
SELECT     dbo.Notes.NoteID, dbo.Notes.NoteDate, dbo.Notes.Note_Value, dbo.Notes.CusID, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.Notes.UserID, 
                      dbo.TblUsers.UserName, dbo.Notes.CashingType, dbo.Notes.Remark, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial, 
                      dbo.TransactionTypes.TransactionTypeName, dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxID, dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxName, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, 
                      dbo.Notes.RevenuesID, dbo.TblRevenuesTypes.RevenuesName, dbo.Notes.NoteSerial
FROM         dbo.TblCustemers RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TblBoxesData RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TblRevenuesTypes RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TblUsers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Notes ON dbo.TblUsers.UserID = dbo.Notes.UserID ON dbo.TblRevenuesTypes.RevenuesID = dbo.Notes.RevenuesID ON 
                      dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxID = dbo.Notes.BoxID ON dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = dbo.Notes.CusID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TransactionTypes ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type ON 
                      dbo.Notes.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID
WHERE     (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 4)

create view ChequePrintQry as            SELECT     dbo.ChequePrint.Id, dbo.ChequePrint.Cheque_NO, dbo.ChequePrint.BankID, dbo.ChequePrint.Recorddate, dbo.ChequePrint.ChequeDate,   dbo.ChequePrint.ChequeDateH, dbo.ChequePrint.[To], dbo.ChequePrint.[value], dbo.ChequePrint.valueText, dbo.ChequePrint.basedOn, dbo.BanksData.BankName,    dbo.BanksData.report_no , dbo.ChequePrint.valueTexte, dbo.ChequePrint.BranchId  FROM         dbo.ChequePrint INNER JOIN   dbo.BanksData ON dbo.ChequePrint.BankID = dbo.BanksData.BankID

CREATE VIEW dbo.Cost_center_reports
AS
SELECT     dbo.marakes_taklefa_temp.*, dbo.ACCOUNTS.Account_Serial, dbo.ACCOUNTS.currenct_code, currency_1.name AS CuRR_NAme
FROM         dbo.ACCOUNTS INNER JOIN
                      dbo.marakes_taklefa_temp ON dbo.ACCOUNTS.Account_Code = dbo.marakes_taklefa_temp.account_no INNER JOIN
                      dbo.currency currency_1 ON dbo.ACCOUNTS.currenct_code = currency_1.id

CREATE VIEW dbo.credit
AS
SELECT     dbo.Notes.NoteType, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial, dbo.Notes.Note_Value
FROM         dbo.Notes INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.Notes.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID
WHERE     (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.Cus_Accountt
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT Cus_Account.*
FROM         dbo.Cus_Account() Cus_Account
ORDER BY Transaction_Date

CREATE VIEW dbo.Cus_Cash
AS
SELECT     dbo.Notes.NoteID, dbo.Notes.NoteDate, dbo.Notes.NoteSerial, dbo.Notes.Note_Value, dbo.Notes.UserID, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, 
                      dbo.TblUsers.UserName, dbo.Notes.CusID, '3' AS type, dbo.Notes.Remark
FROM         dbo.TblUsers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCustemers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Notes ON dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = dbo.Notes.CusID ON dbo.TblUsers.UserID = dbo.Notes.UserID
WHERE     (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 4)

CREATE VIEW dbo.Cus_DelayVal_To
AS
SELECT     dbo.Notes.NoteDate, dbo.Notes.Note_Value, dbo.Notes.DueDate, dbo.Transactions.CusID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, 
                      dbo.TransactionTypes.TransactionTypeName, dbo.TblUsers.UserName, '2' AS Type, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName
FROM         dbo.TransactionTypes INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblUsers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCustemers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = dbo.Transactions.CusID ON dbo.TblUsers.UserID = dbo.Transactions.UserID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Notes ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Notes.Transaction_ID ON 
                      dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type
WHERE     (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 1) AND (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 1 OR
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 9)

CREATE VIEW dbo.Cus_PayTo
AS
SELECT     dbo.Notes.NoteID, dbo.Notes.NoteDate, dbo.Notes.NoteType, dbo.Notes.NoteSerial, dbo.Notes.Note_Value, dbo.Notes.UserID, 
                      dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.TblUsers.UserName, dbo.Notes.CusID, '4' AS Type, dbo.Notes.Remark
FROM         dbo.TblUsers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCustemers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Notes ON dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = dbo.Notes.CusID ON dbo.TblUsers.UserID = dbo.Notes.UserID
WHERE     (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 5)

CREATE VIEW dbo.CusAccount
AS
SELECT     dbo.Notes.NoteID, dbo.Notes.NoteDate, dbo.Notes.NoteSerial, dbo.Notes.NoteType, dbo.Notes.Note_Value, dbo.Notes.DueDate, 
                      dbo.Notes.CusID AS CusID_Note, dbo.Transactions.CusID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, dbo.TblMaintenece.CusID AS CusID_Maint
FROM         dbo.Transactions RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TblMaintenece RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.Notes ON dbo.TblMaintenece.MaintananceID = dbo.Notes.MaintananceID ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Notes.Transaction_ID
WHERE     (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 1) OR
                      (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 4) OR
                      (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 5)

CREATE VIEW AA AS
SELECT *
	FROM QryKhsmvalue UNION select * from QryMokafeaValue

CREATE VIEW dbo.DestructioItems
AS
SELECT     dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemCase, 
                      dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemSerial, dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity, dbo.Transaction_Details.Price, TblItems_2.ItemName, TblItems_1.HaveSerial, 
                      dbo.Transactions.StoreID, dbo.TblStore.StoreName, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial, dbo.Transactions.WorkOrderID, 
                      TblItems_1.ItemCode AS AssbliedItemCode, dbo.TblWorkOrdersData.WorkOrderState, dbo.TblWorkOrdersData.WorkOrderCode, 
                      dbo.TblWorkOrdersData.AssbliedItemID, TblItems_1.ItemName AS AsbbliedItemName, dbo.TblItemsParts.PartItemQty, 
                      dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID, TblItems_2.ItemCode AS PartItemCode
FROM         dbo.TblStore INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.TblStore.StoreID = dbo.Transactions.StoreID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transaction_Details ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblWorkOrdersData INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems TblItems_1 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItemsParts ON TblItems_1.ItemID = dbo.TblItemsParts.ItemID ON dbo.TblWorkOrdersData.AssbliedItemID = TblItems_1.ItemID ON 
                      dbo.Transactions.WorkOrderID = dbo.TblWorkOrdersData.WorkOrderID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems TblItems_2 ON dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID = TblItems_2.ItemID AND dbo.TblItemsParts.PartItemID = TblItems_2.ItemID
WHERE     (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 18)

CREATE VIEW dbo.DestructioItemsNew
AS
SELECT     dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemCase, 
                      dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemSerial, dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity, dbo.Transaction_Details.Price, TblItems_2.ItemName, TblItems_1.HaveSerial, 
                      dbo.Transactions.StoreID, dbo.TblStore.StoreName, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial, dbo.Transactions.WorkOrderID, 
                      TblItems_1.ItemCode AS AssbliedItemCode, dbo.TblWorkOrdersData.WorkOrderState, dbo.TblWorkOrdersData.WorkOrderCode, 
                      dbo.TblWorkOrdersData.AssbliedItemID, TblItems_1.ItemName AS AsbbliedItemName, dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID, 
                      TblItems_2.ItemCode AS PartItemCode
FROM         dbo.TblStore INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.TblStore.StoreID = dbo.Transactions.StoreID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transaction_Details ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblWorkOrdersData INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems TblItems_1 ON dbo.TblWorkOrdersData.AssbliedItemID = TblItems_1.ItemID ON 
                      dbo.Transactions.WorkOrderID = dbo.TblWorkOrdersData.WorkOrderID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems TblItems_2 ON dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID = TblItems_2.ItemID
WHERE     (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 18)

CREATE VIEW dbo.double_entry_voucher_with_name
AS
SELECT     dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.DEV_ID_Line_No, dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.Double_Entry_Vouchers_ID, dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.[Value], 
                      dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.Credit_Or_Debit, dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.Double_Entry_Vouchers_Description, dbo.ACCOUNTS.Account_Serial, 
                      dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.Account_Code, dbo.ACCOUNTS.Account_Name, dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.RecordDate, 
                      dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.Notes_ID, dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.UserID, dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.credit_value, 
                      dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.depet_value, dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.DEV_Serial, dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.Account_Interval_ID, 
                      dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.des
FROM         dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS INNER JOIN
                      dbo.ACCOUNTS ON dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.Account_Code = dbo.ACCOUNTS.Account_Code

CREATE VIEW dbo.Emcount
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.TblEmployee.CustNum, COUNT(dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Code) AS cot, TblCustemers.CountEmp, 
                      TblCustemers.CusID
FROM         dbo.TblCustemers TblCustemers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblEmployee ON TblCustemers.CusID = dbo.TblEmployee.CustNum
GROUP BY TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.TblEmployee.CustNum, TblCustemers.CountEmp, TblCustemers.CusID

dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Code,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name1,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name2,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name3,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name4,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Mail,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Phone,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_mobile,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Remark,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Comm,        dbo.TblEmployee.EmpProfitCom,        dbo.TblEmployee.workstate,        dbo.TblEmployee.DepartmentID,        dbo.TblEmployee.JobTypeID,        dbo.TblEmployee.SpecificationID,        dbo.TblEmployee.Region,        dbo.TblEmployee.InsuranceState,        dbo.TblEmployee.InsuranceValue,        dbo.TblEmployee.OtherDiscounts,        dbo.TblEmployee.placeEkama,        dbo.TblEmployee.NumEkama,        dbo.TblEmployee.DateExpoekama,        dbo.TblEmployee.DateEndekama,        dbo.TblEmployee.DateExpoekamaH,        dbo.TblEmployee.DateEndekamah,        dbo.TblEmployee.NumLicn,        dbo.TblEmployee.DateExpLinc,        dbo.TblEmployee.DateEndLinc,        dbo.TblEmployee.DateExpLincH,        dbo.TblEmployee.DateEndLincH,        dbo.TblEmployee.NumPoket,        dbo.TblEmployee.Dateexppoket,        dbo.TblEmployee.dateendpoket,        dbo.TblEmployee.NumPasp,        dbo.TblEmployee.DateEndPasp,        dbo.TblEmployee.DateExpPasp,        dbo.TblEmployee.EmpNum,        dbo.TblEmployee.CustNum,        dbo.TblEmployee.ChekEndWork,        dbo.TblEmployee.ChekStkala,        dbo.TblEmployee.BignDateWork,        dbo.TblEmployee.EndWork,        dbo.TblEmployee.Notsstkala,        dbo.TblEmployee.checkbox1,        dbo.TblEmployee.DOB,        dbo.TblEmployee.KafelID,        dbo.TblEmployee.KafelName,        dbo.TblEmployee.pasplace,        dbo.TblEmployee.Nationality,        dbo.TblEmployee.dean,        dbo.TblEmployee.hdodno,        dbo.TblEmployee.hdoddate,        dbo.TblEmployee.hdomnfaz,        dbo.TblEmployee.kafeltel,        dbo.TblEmployee.jopstatusid,        dbo.TblEmployee.kafeladd,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary_sakn,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary_bus,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary_food,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary_mob,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary_mang,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary_others,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary_sakn1,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary_bus1,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary_food1,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary_others1,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary_mob1,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary_mang1,        dbo.TblEmployee.Account_code,        dbo.TblEmployee.Account_code1,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary_saknc,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary_busc,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary_foodc,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary_othersc,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary_mobc,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary_mangc,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary_saknc1,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary_busc1,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary_foodc1,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary_othersc1,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary_mobc1,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary_mangc1,        dbo.TblEmployee.ItemPhoto,        dbo.TblEmployee.placeWORK,        dbo.TblEmployee.project_id,        dbo.TblEmployee.Account_Code2,        dbo.TblEmployee.Dateexppoketh,        dbo.TblEmployee.dateendpoketh,        dbo.TblEmployee.opr_fullcode,        dbo.TblEmployee.term_id,        dbo.TblEmployee.opr_id, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Namee2,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Namee1,        dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Namee,        dbo.TblEmployee.BranchId,        dbo.TblEmployee.cost_center_id,        dbo.jopstatus.namee,        dbo.TblEmpJobsTypes.JobTypeNamee,        dbo.TblEmpJobsTypes.VisaCode,        dbo.TblEmpDepartments.DepartmentNamee,        dbo.TblEmpDepartments.DeptColor,        dbo.TblEmpDepartments.DeptBr,        dbo.TblEmpDepartments.Dpeterial,        dbo.TblEmpDepartments.short,        dbo.EmpGroupDep.GroupName  AS LocationName,        dbo.EmpGroupDep.Fullcode   AS FullGroupCode,        dbo.EmpGroupDep.Ename      AS LocationNameE,        dbo.TblEmployee.NationlID,        InsuranceRenewA = CASE  TblEmployee.InsuranceRenew WHEN 1 THEN 'تم التجديد' ELSE 'لم يتم التجديد' END , CREATE VIEW dbo.esat
AS

FROM         dbo.InstallMent INNER JOIN
                      dbo.InstallMentDetails ON dbo.InstallMent.PartID = dbo.InstallMentDetails.PartID

FROM         dbo.Transactions INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Notes ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Notes.Transaction_ID INNER JOIN

                      dbo.InstallMentDetails ON dbo.InstallMent.PartID = dbo.InstallMentDetails.PartID

CREATE VIEW dbo.ExpensesReport
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.Notes.NoteID, dbo.Notes.NoteDate, dbo.Notes.NoteType, dbo.Notes.Note_Value, dbo.Notes.ExpensesID, dbo.ExpensesType.Name, 
                      dbo.Notes.NoteSerial, dbo.Notes.Remark, dbo.TblUsers.UserName, dbo.Notes.BoxID, dbo.Notes.UserID, dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxName, dbo.BanksData.BankName, 
                      dbo.Notes.BankID, dbo.Notes.ChqueNum, dbo.Notes.DueDate
FROM         dbo.TblUsers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.ExpensesType INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Notes ON dbo.ExpensesType.ID = dbo.Notes.ExpensesID ON dbo.TblUsers.UserID = dbo.Notes.UserID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TblBoxesData ON dbo.Notes.BoxID = dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.BanksData ON dbo.Notes.BankID = dbo.BanksData.BankID
WHERE     (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 3)
ORDER BY dbo.Notes.NoteID

FROM         dbo.QryItemsInventry(DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT) QryItemsInventry INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems ON QryItemsInventry.Item_ID = dbo.TblItems.ItemID
ORDER BY QryItemsInventry.Item_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.items_qty_not_recieved_in_order
AS
SELECT     Item_ID, order_no, MAX(Quantity) AS sum_qty, SUM(QTYRSV) AS sum_recieved, MAX(Quantity) - SUM(QTYRSV) AS net
FROM         dbo.QRY_items_orders_data
GROUP BY Item_ID, order_no

create view Items_Status_totals1 as   SELECT     order_no AS order_nox1, StoreID AS StoreIDx1, StoreName AS StoreNamex1, totalPurchaseQty AS totalPurchaseQtyx1, totalPurchaseValue AS totalPurchaseValuex1,    totalSalesQty As totalSalesQtyx1, SaleValueValue As SaleValueValuex1, SaleValue1 As SaleValuex1, actualQty As actualQtyx1   From dbo.Items_Status2 Where (StoreID = 1)

create view Items_Status_totals2 as  SELECT     order_no AS order_nox2, StoreID AS StoreIDx2, StoreName AS StoreNamex2, totalPurchaseQty AS totalPurchaseQtyx2, totalPurchaseValue AS totalPurchaseValuex2,   totalSalesQty As totalSalesQtyx2, SaleValueValue As SaleValueValuex2, SaleValue1 As SaleValuex2, actualQty As actualQtyx2   From dbo.Items_Status2   WHERE     (StoreID = 2)

create view Items_Status_totals3 as  SELECT     order_no AS order_nox3, StoreID AS StoreIDx3, StoreName AS StoreNamex3, totalPurchaseQty AS totalPurchaseQtyx3, totalPurchaseValue AS totalPurchaseValuex3,    totalSalesQty As totalSalesQtyx3, SaleValueValue As SaleValueValuex3, SaleValue1 As SaleValuex3, actualQty As actualQtyx3   From dbo.Items_Status2   WHERE     (StoreID = 3)

create view Items_Status_totals4 as  SELECT     order_no AS order_nox4, StoreID AS StoreIDx4, StoreName AS StoreNamex4, totalPurchaseQty AS totalPurchaseQtyx4, totalPurchaseValue AS totalPurchaseValuex4,   totalSalesQty As totalSalesQtyx4, SaleValueValue As SaleValueValuex4, SaleValue1 As SaleValuex4, actualQty As actualQtyx4 From dbo.Items_Status2  WHERE     (StoreID = 4)

create view Items_Status_totals5 as  SELECT     order_no AS order_nox5, StoreID AS StoreIDx5, StoreName AS StoreNamex5, totalPurchaseQty AS totalPurchaseQtyx5, totalPurchaseValue AS totalPurchaseValuex5,  totalSalesQty As totalSalesQtyx5, SaleValueValue As SaleValueValuex5, SaleValue1 As SaleValuex5, actualQty As actualQtyx5 From dbo.Items_Status2  WHERE     (StoreID = 5)

create view Items_Status_totals6 as  SELECT     order_no AS order_nox6, StoreID AS StoreIDx6, StoreName AS StoreNamex6, totalPurchaseQty AS totalPurchaseQtyx6, totalPurchaseValue AS totalPurchaseValuex6,  totalSalesQty As totalSalesQtyx6, SaleValueValue As SaleValueValuex6, SaleValue1 As SaleValuex6, actualQty As actualQtyx6 From dbo.Items_Status2  WHERE     (StoreID = 6)

create view Items_Status_totals7 as  SELECT     order_no AS order_nox7, StoreID AS StoreIDx7, StoreName AS StoreNamex7, totalPurchaseQty AS totalPurchaseQtyx7, totalPurchaseValue AS totalPurchaseValuex7,    totalSalesQty As totalSalesQtyx7, SaleValueValue As SaleValueValuex7, SaleValue1 As SaleValuex7, actualQty As actualQtyx7 From dbo.Items_Status2  WHERE     (StoreID = 7)

create view Items_Status1 as   SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT SUM(dbo.TransactionTypes.StockEffect * dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity * dbo.TblItems.SallingPrice) AS qty,    SUM(dbo.TransactionTypes.StockEffect * dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity) AS Realqty, dbo.Transaction_Details.order_no   FROM         dbo.Transaction_Details INNER JOIN    dbo.TblItems ON dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID = dbo.TblItems.ItemID INNER JOIN    dbo.Transactions ON dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID INNER JOIN    dbo.TransactionTypes ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type    GROUP BY dbo.Transaction_Details.order_no

create view Items_Status2 as  SELECT     dbo.Transaction_Details.order_no, dbo.Transactions.StoreID, dbo.TblStore.StoreName, SUM(dbo.Transaction_Details.OpeningBurcahseQty) AS totalPurchaseQty,   SUM(dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity * dbo.TransactionTypes.StockEffect) AS actualQty, SUM(dbo.Transaction_Details.OpeningBurcahseValue)   AS totalPurchaseValue, SUM(dbo.Transaction_Details.OpeningSalesQty) AS totalSalesQty, SUM(dbo.Transaction_Details.OpeningSalesValue) AS SaleValueValue,  dbo.Items_Status1.qty AS SaleValue1  FROM         dbo.Transactions INNER JOIN  dbo.Transaction_Details ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID INNER JOIN   dbo.TblStore ON dbo.Transactions.StoreID = dbo.TblStore.StoreID INNER JOIN   dbo.TransactionTypes ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type LEFT OUTER JOIN   dbo.Items_Status1 ON dbo.Transaction_Details.order_no = dbo.Items_Status1.order_no  GROUP BY dbo.Transaction_Details.order_no, dbo.Transactions.StoreID, dbo.TblStore.StoreName, dbo.Items_Status1.qty

CREATE VIEW dbo.ItemsTrans
AS
SELECT     dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transactions.CusID, 
                      dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemCase, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemSerial, dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity, 
                      dbo.Transaction_Details.Price, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemDiscountType, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemDiscount, dbo.TblItems.ItemName, 
                      dbo.TblItems.HaveSerial, dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID, dbo.TransactionTypes.TransactionTypeName, dbo.TblItems.ItemCode, 
                      dbo.TblItems.GroupID, dbo.Groups.GroupName, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial, dbo.TblStore.StoreID, dbo.TblStore.StoreName, 
                      dbo.Transactions.PaymentType
FROM         dbo.TransactionTypes INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCustemers RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = dbo.Transactions.CusID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transaction_Details ON dbo.TblItems.ItemID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID ON 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID ON 
                      dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Groups ON dbo.TblItems.GroupID = dbo.Groups.GroupID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblStore ON dbo.Transactions.StoreID = dbo.TblStore.StoreID
WHERE     (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 1) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 2) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 3) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 8) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 9) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 5) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 22) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 21)

CREATE VIEW dbo.ItemsTree
AS
SELECT DISTINCT dbo.TblItems.GroupID, dbo.Groups.GroupName, dbo.Groups.ParentID
FROM         dbo.Groups INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems ON dbo.Groups.GroupID = dbo.TblItems.GroupID

create view khasmedafaview as  select TblKhsmEdafa.KhsmEdafa_Date, tblKhsmEdafa.Emp_ID, Emp_Code,   TblEmployee.Emp_Name,     'Khsm_Value'=Case   WHEN [tblKhsmEdafa].[KhsmEdafa_Type]=0 THEN     CASE   WHEN CalculateValueType=0 THEN ([Emp_Salary]/30)*([tblKhsmEdafa].[KhsmEdafa_Value])*-1   ELSE [tblKhsmEdafa].[KhsmEdafa_Value]*-1   End   Else     CASE   WHEN CalculateValueType=0 THEN  ([Emp_Salary]/30)*([tblKhsmEdafa].[KhsmEdafa_Value])   Else: [tblKhsmEdafa].[KhsmEdafa_Value]   End   End   ,TblKhsmEdafa.KhsmEdafa_Type,   tblKhsmEdafa.Notes , tblKhsmEdafa.CalculateValueType   FROM TblEmployee  LEFT  JOIN tblKhsmEdafa ON TblEmployee.Emp_ID = tblKhsmEdafa.Emp_ID     where KhsmEdafa_Type is not null

CREATE VIEW dbo.LateAddTime
AS
SELECT     Emp_ID, SUM(CONVERT(integer, LEFT(LateTime, 2))) + SUM(CONVERT(float, RIGHT(LateTime, 2))) / 60 AS late, SUM({ fn HOUR(GenDepartureTime) 
                      } - { fn HOUR(CurrentDepartureTime) }) AS addtime, COUNT(*) AS Expr2
FROM         dbo.tblPresentTime
WHERE     (MONTH(GenPresentTime) = MONTH(GETDATE())) AND (YEAR(GenPresentTime) = YEAR(GETDATE()))
GROUP BY Emp_ID

create view NetRemCus as   SELECT YEAR,CusID,CusName,CusNamee,Sum(RetValue) RetValue  FROM ( SELECT        Year(dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date) Year,        dbo.Transactions.CusID,        dbo.TblCustemers.CusName,        dbo.TblCustemers.CusNamee,        (            SELECT SUM(Transaction_NetValue + ISNULL(vat, 0)) AS SumValue            FROM   dbo.Transactions AS A            Where (a.Transaction_Type = 9)                   AND (A.ReturnSerial = dbo.Transactions.NoteSerial1)        )  AS RetValue From dbo.transactions        LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.TblBranchesData             ON  dbo.Transactions.BranchId = dbo.TblBranchesData.branch_id        LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.TblCustemers             ON  dbo.Transactions.CusID = dbo.TblCustemers.CusID Where (dbo.transactions.PaymentType = 1)        AND (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 21) ) T Where IsNull(retvalue, 0) <> 0 GROUP BY  Year,        CusID,        CusName,        CusNamee

create view NetRemSalesMan as   SELECT YEAR,        Emp_ID,        t.emp_Name,        SUM(RetValue)     RetValue FROM   (            SELECT YEAR(dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date) YEAR,                   dbo.Transactions.Emp_ID,                    te.Emp_Name,                   (                       SELECT SUM(Transaction_NetValue + ISNULL(vat, 0)) AS SumValue                       FROM   dbo.Transactions AS A                       Where (a.Transaction_Type = 9)                              AND (A.ReturnSerial = dbo.Transactions.NoteSerial1)                   ) AS RetValue            From dbo.transactions                   LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.TblBranchesData                        ON  dbo.Transactions.BranchId = dbo.TblBranchesData.branch_id                   LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.TblEmployee AS te                        ON  dbo.Transactions.Emp_ID = te.Emp_ID            Where (dbo.transactions.PaymentType = 1)                   AND (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 21)        )                 T Where IsNull(retvalue, 0) <> 0 Group By        YEAR,        Emp_ID,        t.emp_Name

CREATE VIEW dbo.NOTES_TRANSACTIONS
AS
SELECT     dbo.Notes.NoteID, dbo.Notes.NoteDate, dbo.Notes.NoteType, dbo.Notes.NoteSerial, dbo.Notes.Note_Value, dbo.Notes.CusID, dbo.Notes.BoxID, dbo.Notes.Remark, 
                      dbo.Notes.BankID, dbo.Notes.ChqueNum, dbo.Notes.DueDate, dbo.Notes.Transaction_ID, dbo.Notes.UserID, dbo.Notes.CashingType, 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID AS Expr1, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date
FROM         dbo.Notes INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.Notes.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.opr_qty_total
AS
SELECT     dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transaction_Details.payed, dbo.Transaction_Details.opr_fullcode, 
                      dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity * dbo.Transaction_Details.Price AS total
FROM         dbo.Transaction_Details INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID
WHERE     (dbo.Transaction_Details.payed = 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.Order_no_details
AS
SELECT     dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, dbo.Transactions.CusID, dbo.Transactions.countryid, 
                      dbo.Transactions.order_no, dbo.Transactions.remark, dbo.TblCountriesData.CountryName, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.TblCustemers.CusNamee, 
                      dbo.Transactions.Closed, dbo.Transactions.Currency_id, dbo.currency.code AS currency_code
FROM         dbo.Transactions INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCustemers ON dbo.Transactions.CusID = dbo.TblCustemers.CusID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.currency ON dbo.Transactions.Currency_id = dbo.currency.id LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCountriesData ON dbo.Transactions.countryid = dbo.TblCountriesData.CountryID

CREATE VIEW dbo.[Orders Not Yet Shipped]
AS
SELECT     dbo.Transactions.order_no, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transactions.CusID, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.Transactions.Total, 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, dbo.Transactions.shipped, dbo.currency.code, dbo.Transactions.Currency_id
FROM         dbo.Transactions INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCustemers ON dbo.Transactions.CusID = dbo.TblCustemers.CusID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.currency ON dbo.Transactions.Currency_id = dbo.currency.id
WHERE     (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 6) AND (dbo.Transactions.shipped = 0)

create view payment_voucher as  SELECT     dbo.Notes.Note_Value, dbo.Notes.BankID, dbo.Notes.ChqueNum, dbo.BanksData.BankName, dbo.Notes.NoteType, dbo.Notes.BoxID, dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxName,                       dbo.Notes.CusID, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.TblCustemers.CusNamee, dbo.Notes.Remark, dbo.Notes.NoteSerial, dbo.Notes.NoteDate,                      dbo.Notes.note_value_by_characters , dbo.Notes.NoteID, dbo.Notes.general_des_notes, dbo.Notes.person, dbo.Notes.ManulaNO   FROM         dbo.Notes LEFT OUTER JOIN                      dbo.TblBoxesData ON dbo.Notes.BoxID = dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxID LEFT OUTER JOIN                      dbo.TblCustemers ON dbo.Notes.CusID = dbo.TblCustemers.CusID LEFT OUTER JOIN                      dbo.BanksData ON dbo.Notes.BankID = dbo.BanksData.BankID  Where (dbo.Notes.notetype = 4)

CREATE VIEW dbo.PaymentsReport
AS
SELECT     dbo.Notes.NoteID, dbo.Notes.NoteDate, dbo.Notes.Note_Value, dbo.Notes.CusID, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.Notes.UserID, 
                      dbo.TblUsers.UserName, dbo.Notes.CashingType, dbo.Notes.NoteSerial, dbo.Notes.Remark, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial, dbo.TransactionTypes.TransactionTypeName, dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxID, dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxName, 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type
FROM         dbo.TransactionTypes RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TblUsers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCustemers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblBoxesData INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Notes ON dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxID = dbo.Notes.BoxID ON dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = dbo.Notes.CusID ON 
                      dbo.TblUsers.UserID = dbo.Notes.UserID ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Notes.Transaction_ID ON 
                      dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type
WHERE     (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 5)

CREATE VIEW dbo.PaymentTime
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, dbo.TransactionTypes.TransactionTypeName, 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.Notes.NoteID, dbo.Notes.NoteType, dbo.Notes.Note_Value, dbo.Notes.DueDate, 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial, dbo.TblCustemers.CusID, dbo.Notes.NoteDate, dbo.TblNotesTypes.NotesTypeName
FROM         dbo.TransactionTypes INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCustemers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = dbo.Transactions.CusID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblNotesTypes INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Notes ON dbo.TblNotesTypes.NotesType = dbo.Notes.NoteType ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Notes.Transaction_ID ON 
                      dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type
WHERE     (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 1) OR
                      (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 2) OR
                      (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 13)
ORDER BY dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.PriceListTree
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.TblItems.ItemID, dbo.TblItems.ItemName, dbo.TblItems.ItemCode, dbo.TblItems.GroupID, dbo.TblItems.LastUpdate, 
                      dbo.TblItems.SallingPrice, PriceListGard.Qty, dbo.TblItems.CustomerPrice, dbo.TblItems.DealerPrice
FROM         dbo.TblItems LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.PriceListGard() PriceListGard ON dbo.TblItems.ItemID = PriceListGard.ItemID
GROUP BY dbo.TblItems.ItemID, dbo.TblItems.ItemName, dbo.TblItems.ItemCode, dbo.TblItems.GroupID, dbo.TblItems.LastUpdate, dbo.TblItems.SallingPrice, 
                      PriceListGard.Qty, dbo.TblItems.CustomerPrice, dbo.TblItems.DealerPrice
ORDER BY dbo.TblItems.ItemID

CREATE VIEW dbo.printed_card
AS
SELECT     MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_TYPE, BILL_NO, OPR_TYPE, type, USER_NAME, operation_date, recived_name, SSN, recived_user_name, received_date, 
                      RECIVED, PRINTED
FROM         dbo.ready_to_print
WHERE     (PRINTED = 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.Qest_Had_Receipted
AS
SELECT     dbo.QryCust_Qest.QestID, dbo.QryCust_Qest.QeqtNum, dbo.InstallmentDet_Junc_Receipt.[Value], dbo.QryCust_Qest.Transaction_ID, 
                      dbo.QryCust_Qest.CustID, dbo.ReceiptQest.ReceiptID, dbo.ReceiptQest.ReceiptDate, dbo.InstallmentDet_Junc_Receipt.Status, 
                      dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.QryCust_Qest.Transaction_Serial, dbo.QryCust_Qest.Type, dbo.ReceiptQest.ReceiptType, 
                      dbo.QryCust_Qest.TransactionTypeName, dbo.QryCust_Qest.[Value] AS QestValue
FROM         dbo.ReceiptQest INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCustemers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.QryCust_Qest INNER JOIN
                      dbo.InstallMentDetails ON dbo.QryCust_Qest.QestID = dbo.InstallMentDetails.QestID ON 
                      dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = dbo.QryCust_Qest.CustID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.InstallmentDet_Junc_Receipt ON dbo.InstallMentDetails.QestID = dbo.InstallmentDet_Junc_Receipt.QestID ON 
                      dbo.ReceiptQest.ReceiptID = dbo.InstallmentDet_Junc_Receipt.ReceiptID

CREATE VIEW dbo.Qest_Receipted_Total
AS
SELECT     SUM(dbo.InstallmentDet_Junc_Receipt.[Value]) AS Total, dbo.QryCust_Qest.CustID, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName
FROM         dbo.ReceiptQest INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCustemers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.QryCust_Qest INNER JOIN
                      dbo.InstallMentDetails ON dbo.QryCust_Qest.QestID = dbo.InstallMentDetails.QestID ON 
                      dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = dbo.QryCust_Qest.CustID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.InstallmentDet_Junc_Receipt ON dbo.InstallMentDetails.QestID = dbo.InstallmentDet_Junc_Receipt.QestID ON 
                      dbo.ReceiptQest.ReceiptID = dbo.InstallmentDet_Junc_Receipt.ReceiptID
GROUP BY dbo.QryCust_Qest.CustID, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName

CREATE VIEW dbo.QestNotReceipted
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT QestID, NoteID, QeqtNum, PartID, [Value], DueDate, Receipt, Summition, CustID, CusName, Transaction_ID, Transaction_Date
FROM         dbo.QryCust_Qest
WHERE     (QestID NOT IN
                          (SELECT     QestID
                             FROM         InstallmentDet_Junc_Receipt
                             WHERE     Status <> 1))
ORDER BY CusName

CREATE VIEW dbo.QestNotReceipted_Total
AS
SELECT     Summition, CustID, CusName, ReceiptedVal, Summition - ReceiptedVal AS LateVal
FROM         (SELECT     SUM(dbo.InstallMentDetails.[Value]) AS Summition, dbo.InstallMent.CustID, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, 
                                              dbo.Qest_Receipted_Total.Total AS ReceiptedVal
                        FROM         dbo.Transactions INNER JOIN
                                              dbo.TblCustemers INNER JOIN
                                              dbo.Notes INNER JOIN
                                              dbo.Qest_Receipted_Total INNER JOIN
                                              dbo.InstallMent ON dbo.Qest_Receipted_Total.CustID = dbo.InstallMent.CustID INNER JOIN
                                              dbo.InstallMentDetails LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                              dbo.InstallmentDet_Junc_Receipt ON dbo.InstallMentDetails.QestID = dbo.InstallmentDet_Junc_Receipt.QestID ON 
                                              dbo.InstallMent.PartID = dbo.InstallMentDetails.PartID ON dbo.Notes.NoteID = dbo.InstallMent.NoteID ON 
                                              dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = dbo.InstallMent.CustID ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Notes.Transaction_ID
                        GROUP BY dbo.InstallMent.CustID, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.Qest_Receipted_Total.Total) XTable

CREATE VIEW dbo.QRY_items_orders_data
AS
SELECT     dbo.QRYORDERSQTY.*, dbo.QRYResevedOrderQty.Quantity AS QTYRSV, dbo.QRYORDERSQTY.Transaction_Date AS Order_date, 
                      dbo.QRYResevedOrderQty.Transaction_Date AS Reseved_date, dbo.TblItems.ItemName AS ItemName, dbo.TblItems.ItemCode AS ItemCode, 
                      dbo.QRYORDERSQTY.Price AS PurchasePrice
FROM         dbo.QRYORDERSQTY INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems ON dbo.QRYORDERSQTY.Item_ID = dbo.TblItems.ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.QRYResevedOrderQty ON dbo.QRYORDERSQTY.Item_ID = dbo.QRYResevedOrderQty.Item_ID AND 
                      dbo.QRYORDERSQTY.order_no = dbo.QRYResevedOrderQty.order_no

CREATE VIEW dbo.QRY_temp_bill_items
AS
SELECT     dbo.temp_bill_items.ItemID, dbo.TblItems.ItemCode, dbo.TblItems.ItemName
FROM         dbo.TblItems INNER JOIN
                      dbo.temp_bill_items ON dbo.TblItems.ItemID = dbo.temp_bill_items.ItemID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryAbsentEmp
AS
SELECT     CONVERT(smalldatetime, dbo.tblAbsent.Abs_Date, 103) AS AbsDate, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name, dbo.tblJunkAbsent.Emp_ID, 
                      dbo.tblAbsent.Abs_Code, dbo.tblAbsent.Abs_ID, dbo.tblVacancy.Vac_Name, dbo.tblVacancy.Vac_ID
FROM         dbo.tblVacancy INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblEmployee INNER JOIN
                      dbo.tblAbsent INNER JOIN
                      dbo.tblJunkAbsent ON dbo.tblAbsent.Abs_ID = dbo.tblJunkAbsent.Abs_ID ON dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID = dbo.tblJunkAbsent.Emp_ID ON 
                      dbo.tblVacancy.Vac_ID = dbo.tblJunkAbsent.Vac_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryAbsentValue
AS
SELECT     dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name, dbo.tblVacancy.Vac_Name, dbo.tblVacancy.Vac_ID, dbo.tblVacancy.Dis_Count, dbo.tblAbsent.Abs_Date, 
                      dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary / 30 * dbo.tblVacancy.Dis_Count AS DiscountValue, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID
FROM         dbo.tblAbsent FULL OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TblEmployee LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.tblVacancy RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.tblJunkAbsent ON dbo.tblVacancy.Vac_ID = dbo.tblJunkAbsent.Vac_ID ON dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID = dbo.tblJunkAbsent.Emp_ID ON 
                      dbo.tblAbsent.Abs_ID = dbo.tblJunkAbsent.Abs_ID
WHERE     (dbo.tblVacancy.Dis_Count > 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryAllowsDiscounts
AS
SELECT     dbo.Notes.NoteID, dbo.Notes.NoteDate, dbo.Notes.NoteType, dbo.Notes.NoteSerial, dbo.Notes.Note_Value, dbo.Notes.Transaction_ID, 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, dbo.TransactionTypes.TransactionTypeName, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, 
                      dbo.TblUsers.UserName, dbo.TblNotesTypes.NotesTypeName, dbo.Notes.Remark, dbo.Notes.CusID
FROM         dbo.TblUsers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblNotesTypes INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCustemers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Notes ON dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = dbo.Notes.CusID ON dbo.TblNotesTypes.NotesType = dbo.Notes.NoteType ON 
                      dbo.TblUsers.UserID = dbo.Notes.UserID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TransactionTypes ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type ON 
                      dbo.Notes.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID
WHERE     (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 9) OR
                      (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 10)

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryBalanceOpening

                      dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemSerial, dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemCase,

                      dbo.TblItems INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transaction_Details ON dbo.TblItems.ItemID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID ON 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryBalenceRepeat
AS
SELECT     dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID, dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity, 
                      dbo.Transactions.StoreID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, dbo.TblStore.StoreName

create view QryBarcode as   SELECT     dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID, dbo.TblItems.ItemName, dbo.TblItems.ItemCode, dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity,      dbo.TblItems.SallingPrice , dbo.TblItems.PartNo   FROM         dbo.Transactions INNER JOIN  dbo.TblItems INNER JOIN  dbo.Transaction_Details ON dbo.TblItems.ItemID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryBoxBalanceNew
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT QryBoxBalance.*, dbo.TempBoxStockTable.Comment AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.QryBoxBalance() QryBoxBalance LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TempBoxStockTable ON QryBoxBalance.NoteDate = dbo.TempBoxStockTable.BoxStockDate AND 
                      QryBoxBalance.BoxID = dbo.TempBoxStockTable.BoxID
WHERE     (QryBoxBalance.BoxID = 1)
ORDER BY QryBoxBalance.NoteDate, QryBoxBalance.NoteID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryBoxBalanceShort
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT BoxID, BoxName, TransactionTypeName, TransDir, SUM(Note_Value) AS SumNote_Value, COUNT(TransactionTypeName) 
                      AS TransCount
FROM         dbo.QryBoxBalance() QryBoxBalance
GROUP BY BoxID, BoxName, TransactionTypeName, TransDir
ORDER BY TransDir DESC

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryBoxDetectErrors

                      SUM(dbo.TblBoxStockDetails.CurrencyBandCount * dbo.TblCurrencyBandNames.CurrenyBandValue) AS SumStock

                      dbo.TblBoxStockDetails ON dbo.TblBoxStock.BoxStockID = dbo.TblBoxStockDetails.BoxStockID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCurrencyBandNames ON dbo.TblBoxStockDetails.CurrencyBandID = dbo.TblCurrencyBandNames.CurrencyBandID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblBoxesData ON dbo.TblBoxStock.BoxID = dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxID
GROUP BY dbo.TblBoxStock.BoxStockID, dbo.TblBoxStock.BoxStockDate, dbo.TblBoxStock.BoxID, dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxName

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryBoxReports

                      dbo.Notes.Note_Value, dbo.Notes.Remark, dbo.TblUsers.UserName, dbo.TblNotesTypes.NotesTypeName

                      dbo.TblNotesTypes.NotesType = dbo.Notes.NoteType

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryBoxStockReport
AS

                      dbo.TblBoxStock.Remarks, dbo.TblBoxStockDetails.CurrencyBandID, dbo.TblCurrencyBandNames.CurrencyBandName,

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryCheckRelease
AS
SELECT     dbo.TblCheckRelease.OperaID, dbo.TblCheckRelease.OperaDate, dbo.TblCheckRelease.OperaType, dbo.TblCheckReleaseType.CheckTypeName, 
                      dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxName, dbo.TblCheckRelease.NoteValue, dbo.TblUsers.UserName, dbo.Notes.NoteDate, dbo.Notes.ChqueNum, 
                      dbo.Notes.DueDate, dbo.BanksData.BankName, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.TblNotesTypes.NotesTypeName, dbo.Notes.NoteType, 
                      dbo.TblUsers.UserID, dbo.TblCustemers.CusID, dbo.BanksData.BankID, dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxID, dbo.Notes.UserID AS NoteUserID
FROM         dbo.TblCustemers RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TblBoxesData RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TblNotesTypes INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCheckReleaseType INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCheckRelease INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblUsers ON dbo.TblCheckRelease.UserID = dbo.TblUsers.UserID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.BanksData RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.Notes ON dbo.BanksData.BankID = dbo.Notes.BankID ON dbo.TblCheckRelease.NoteID = dbo.Notes.NoteID ON 
                      dbo.TblCheckReleaseType.CheckTypeID = dbo.TblCheckRelease.OperaType ON dbo.TblNotesTypes.NotesType = dbo.Notes.NoteType ON 
                      dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxID = dbo.TblCheckRelease.BoxID ON dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = dbo.Notes.CusID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryChecksReports
AS
SELECT     dbo.Notes.NoteID, dbo.Notes.NoteDate, dbo.Notes.NoteType, dbo.Notes.NoteSerial, dbo.Notes.Note_Value, dbo.BanksData.BankName, 
                      dbo.Notes.ChqueNum, dbo.Notes.DueDate, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial, dbo.TransactionTypes.TransactionTypeName, 
                      dbo.TblCheckRelease.OperaID, dbo.TblCheckRelease.OperaDate, dbo.TblCheckRelease.OperaType, dbo.TblCheckReleaseType.CheckTypeName, 
                      dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxName, dbo.TblUsers.UserName, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName
FROM         dbo.TransactionTypes INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCustemers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCheckReleaseType RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.BanksData INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Notes ON dbo.BanksData.BankID = dbo.Notes.BankID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCheckRelease LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TblBoxesData ON dbo.TblCheckRelease.BoxID = dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TblUsers ON dbo.TblCheckRelease.UserID = dbo.TblUsers.UserID ON dbo.Notes.NoteID = dbo.TblCheckRelease.NoteID ON 
                      dbo.TblCheckReleaseType.CheckTypeID = dbo.TblCheckRelease.OperaType ON dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = dbo.Notes.CusID ON 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Notes.Transaction_ID ON dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryCusBalanceReport
AS
SELECT     QryCustomerBalance.*
FROM         dbo.QryCustomerBalance() QryCustomerBalance

          dbo.InstallMentDetails.DueDate, dbo.InstallMentDetails.Receipt, SUM(dbo.InstallmentDet_Junc_Receipt.[Value]) AS Summition, dbo.InstallMent.CustID,                     dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial,                     dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, dbo.TransactionTypes.TransactionTypeName, dbo.InstallMent.Type, dbo.InstallMentDetails.DueDateH,                     dbo.InstallMent.InstallCount , dbo.InstallMent.total, dbo.Transactions.NoteSerial1, dbo.InstallMent.InterestVal, dbo.InstallMent.BasicAmmount FROM         dbo.Transactions INNER JOIN                     dbo.TblCustemers INNER JOIN                     dbo.Notes INNER JOIN                     dbo.InstallMent INNER JOIN                     dbo.InstallMentDetails LEFT OUTER JOIN                      dbo.InstallmentDet_Junc_Receipt ON dbo.InstallMentDetails.QestID = dbo.InstallmentDet_Junc_Receipt.QestID ON                      dbo.InstallMent.PartID = dbo.InstallMentDetails.PartID ON dbo.Notes.NoteID = dbo.InstallMent.NoteID ON dbo.TblCustemers.CusID =
