CREATE VIEW dbo.QryCustomer
AS
SELECT     dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.TblCustemers.CusID, dbo.TblCustemers.ResponsibleContact, dbo.TblCustemers.Cus_Phone, 
                      dbo.TblCustemers.Cus_mobile, dbo.TblCustemers.Remark, dbo.TblCustemers.OpenBalance, dbo.TblCustemers.OpenBalanceType, 
                      dbo.TblCustemers.OpenBalanceDate, dbo.TblCustemers.E_mail, dbo.TblCustemers.SaleType, dbo.TblCountriesData.CountryName, 
                      dbo.TblCountriesGovernments.GovernmentName, dbo.TblCountriesGovernmentsCities.CityName, dbo.TblCustemers.Address
FROM         dbo.TblCountriesGovernmentsCities RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCustemers LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCountriesData ON dbo.TblCustemers.CountryID = dbo.TblCountriesData.CountryID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCountriesGovernments ON dbo.TblCustemers.GovernmentID = dbo.TblCountriesGovernments.GovernmentID ON 
                      dbo.TblCountriesGovernmentsCities.CityID <> dbo.TblCustemers.CityID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryCustomersBalance AS SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.TblCustemers.CusID, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.TblCustemers.Type, dbo.TblCustemers.OpenBalance,                        dbo.TblCustemers.OpenBalanceType, dbo.TblCustemers.OpenBalanceDate,                        SUM(QryCustomerBalance.Note_Value * QryCustomerBalance.CreditOrDebit) AS CustomerAccount FROM         dbo.QryCustomerBalance(0) QryCustomerBalance INNER JOIN                       dbo.TblCustemers ON QryCustomerBalance.CusID = dbo.TblCustemers.CusID GROUP BY dbo.TblCustemers.CusID, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.TblCustemers.OpenBalance, dbo.TblCustemers.OpenBalanceType,                        dbo.TblCustemers.OpenBalanceDate, dbo.TblCustemers.Type HAVING      (SUM(QryCustomerBalance.Note_Value * QryCustomerBalance.CreditOrDebit) <> 0) ORDER BY dbo.TblCustemers.CusID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryDebitTransactionsValues
AS
SELECT     dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, 
                      dbo.TransactionTypes.TransactionTypeName, dbo.Transactions.PaymentType, dbo.Notes.Note_Value, dbo.Notes.NoteID, dbo.Notes.NoteType, 
                      QryTransactionsTotal.TransSum, QryTransactionsTotal.TotalAfterTax
FROM         dbo.TransactionTypes INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions INNER JOIN
                      dbo.QryTransactionsTotal() QryTransactionsTotal ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_ID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Notes ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Notes.Transaction_ID ON 
                      dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type
WHERE     (dbo.Transactions.PaymentType = 1) AND (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryDelPurchase
AS
SELECT     dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID, 
                      dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemSerial, dbo.TblItems.ItemName, dbo.TransactionTypes.TransactionTypeName, 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial
FROM         dbo.TransactionTypes INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transaction_Details ON dbo.TblItems.ItemID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID ON 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID ON 
                      dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type
WHERE     (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 2) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 5) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 8) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 9) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 10) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 13) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 17) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 18)

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryDevReport
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.Notes.NoteID, dbo.Notes.NoteDate, dbo.Notes.NoteType, dbo.Notes.NoteSerial, dbo.Notes.Note_Value, dbo.TblNotesTypes.NotesTypeName, 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, 
                      dbo.TransactionTypes.TransactionTypeName, dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.Double_Entry_Vouchers_ID, dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.DEV_ID_Line_No, 
                      dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.Account_Code, dbo.ACCOUNTS.Account_Name, dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.[Value], 
                      dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.Credit_Or_Debit, dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.Double_Entry_Vouchers_Description, dbo.ReceiptQest.ReceiptID, 
                      dbo.ReceiptQest.ReceiptDate, dbo.TblCheckRelease.OperaID, dbo.TblCheckRelease.OperaDate, dbo.TblCheckRelease.OperaType, 
                      dbo.TblCheckReleaseType.CheckTypeID, dbo.TblCheckReleaseType.CheckTypeName, dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.RecordDate, 
                      dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.Posted, dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.PostedDate, dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.PostedUserID, 
                      dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.Account_Interval_ID, TblUsers_1.UserName, TblUsers_1.UserName AS PostedUserName, 
                      dbo.ACCOUNTS.Account_NameEng
FROM         dbo.TblUsers TblUsers_1 RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS INNER JOIN
                      dbo.ACCOUNTS ON dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.Account_Code = dbo.ACCOUNTS.Account_Code LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TblUsers TblUsers_2 ON dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.UserID = TblUsers_2.UserID ON 
                      TblUsers_1.UserID = dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.PostedUserID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCheckReleaseType INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCheckRelease ON dbo.TblCheckReleaseType.CheckTypeID = dbo.TblCheckRelease.OperaType ON 
                      dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.OperaID = dbo.TblCheckRelease.OperaID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.ReceiptQest ON dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.ReceiptID = dbo.ReceiptQest.ReceiptID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TblNotesTypes RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TransactionTypes ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.Notes ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Notes.Transaction_ID ON dbo.TblNotesTypes.NotesType = dbo.Notes.NoteType ON 
                      dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.Notes_ID = dbo.Notes.NoteID
ORDER BY dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.DEV_ID_Line_No

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryEmpAllValues
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Code, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary, 
                      SUM(QryAllDiscountWithMkafea.TotalDiscount) AS TotalDiscount, SUM(QryAllDiscountWithMkafea.Mokafea) AS TotalMokafea
FROM         dbo.QryAllDiscountWithMkafea(DEFAULT, DEFAULT) QryAllDiscountWithMkafea RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TblEmployee ON QryAllDiscountWithMkafea.Emp_ID = dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID
GROUP BY QryAllDiscountWithMkafea.Emp_Name, QryAllDiscountWithMkafea.Dis_type, QryAllDiscountWithMkafea.Type, QryAllDiscountWithMkafea.Notes, 
                      dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Code, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary
ORDER BY dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryEmpCom
AS
SELECT     *
FROM         dbo.QryEmpSalesCom('1-Oct-2007', '31-Oct-2007', 6) QryEmpSalesCom

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryEmpLateWithDiscount
AS
SELECT     QryComputeLate.TotalLate, MAX(dbo.QrySliceCnH_M.TotalMinute) AS MaxOfTotalMinute, QryComputeLate.Emp_ID, QryComputeLate.PresentDate, 
                      ISNULL(MAX(dbo.QrySliceCnH_M.Dis_Type), 0) AS Dis_Type
FROM         dbo.QryComputeLate() QryComputeLate LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.QrySliceCnH_M ON QryComputeLate.TotalLate >= dbo.QrySliceCnH_M.TotalMinute
GROUP BY QryComputeLate.TotalLate, QryComputeLate.Emp_ID, QryComputeLate.PresentDate

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryEmpRest
AS
SELECT     *
FROM         dbo.TblEmployee
WHERE     (Emp_ID NOT IN
                          (SELECT     Emp_ID
                             FROM         QryAbsentEmp))

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryEmpSalary
AS
SELECT     Emp_ID, Emp_Name, Emp_Salary, KhsmEdafa_Date AS RDate, SUM(Khsm_Value) AS AddValue
FROM         dbo.QryKhasmMokafeaValue() QryKhasmMokafeaValue
GROUP BY Emp_ID, Emp_Name, Emp_Salary, KhsmEdafa_Date

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryEmpSalarySum
AS
SELECT     Emp_ID, Emp_Name, Emp_Salary, SUM(Khsm_Value) AS Khsm_Value, SUM(CAST(sp1 AS float)) AS Mkafea, KhsmEdafa_Date
FROM         dbo.QryUnionKhsmMkfea() QryUnionKhsmMkfea
GROUP BY Emp_ID, Emp_Name, Emp_Salary, KhsmEdafa_Date

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryEmpsSales
AS
SELECT     dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_ID, QryTransactionsTotal.TransSum, 
                      QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Serial, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Date, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Type
FROM         dbo.TblEmployee INNER JOIN
                      dbo.QryTransactionsTotal() QryTransactionsTotal ON dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID = QryTransactionsTotal.Emp_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryExpensesReport
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.Notes.NoteID, dbo.Notes.NoteDate, dbo.Notes.NoteType, dbo.Notes.Note_Value, dbo.Notes.ExpensesID, 
                      dbo.ExpensesType.Name, dbo.Notes.NoteSerial, dbo.Notes.Remark, dbo.TblUsers.UserName
FROM         dbo.TblUsers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.ExpensesType INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Notes ON dbo.ExpensesType.ID = dbo.Notes.ExpensesID ON dbo.TblUsers.UserID = dbo.Notes.UserID
WHERE     (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 3)
ORDER BY dbo.Notes.NoteID

create view QryGardByDates as  SELECT     SUM(dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity * dbo.TransactionTypes.StockEffect) AS SUMQTY, dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID AS ItemID, dbo.Transactions.StoreID,   dbo.TblStore.StoreName , dbo.Transaction_Details.order_no, dbo.Transaction_Details.Branchid  FROM         dbo.Transactions INNER JOIN   dbo.Transaction_Details ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID INNER JOIN  dbo.TransactionTypes ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type INNER JOIN  dbo.TblItems ON dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID = dbo.TblItems.ItemID INNER JOIN  dbo.TblStore ON dbo.Transactions.StoreID = dbo.TblStore.StoreID LEFT OUTER JOIN  dbo.TblItemsColors ON dbo.Transaction_Details.ColorID = dbo.TblItemsColors.ColorID  WHERE     (dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 1 OR  dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 11 OR  dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 12 OR   dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 3 OR   dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 20 OR  dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 16 OR  dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 2 OR  dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 8 OR  dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 10 OR  dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 13 OR   dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 17 OR   dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 18 OR  dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 19 OR  dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 27 OR  dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 28 OR   dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 15)    GROUP BY dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID, dbo.Transactions.StoreID, dbo.TblStore.StoreName, dbo.Transaction_Details.order_no, dbo.Transaction_Details.BranchId

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryGardReport
AS
SELECT     dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, dbo.Transactions.StoreID, 
                      dbo.TblStore.StoreName, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemSerial, dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity, dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID, 
                      dbo.TblItems.ItemName, dbo.TblItems.ItemCode, dbo.Transaction_Details.Price, dbo.TblItems.GroupID
FROM         dbo.TblStore INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.TblStore.StoreID = dbo.Transactions.StoreID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transaction_Details ON dbo.TblItems.ItemID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID ON 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID
WHERE     (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 4)

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryGardSearch
AS
SELECT     dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.TblStore.StoreName, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type
FROM         dbo.TblStore INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.TblStore.StoreID = dbo.Transactions.StoreID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transaction_Details ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID
GROUP BY dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.TblStore.StoreName, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type
HAVING      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 4)

create view QryGardWithOrderNo as  SELECT     SUM(dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity * dbo.TransactionTypes.StockEffect) AS SUMQTY, dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID as ItemID, dbo.TblItems.ItemCode,    dbo.TblItems.ItemName, dbo.TblItems.PartNo, dbo.Transactions.StoreID, dbo.TblStore.StoreName, dbo.TblItems.GroupID, dbo.Transaction_Details.ColorID,   dbo.TblItemsColors.ColorName , dbo.Transaction_Details.itemsize, dbo.Transaction_Details.order_no, dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type   FROM         dbo.Transactions INNER JOIN   dbo.Transaction_Details ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID INNER JOIN   dbo.TransactionTypes ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type INNER JOIN   dbo.TblItems ON dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID = dbo.TblItems.ItemID INNER JOIN   dbo.TblStore ON dbo.Transactions.StoreID = dbo.TblStore.StoreID LEFT OUTER JOIN   dbo.TblItemsColors ON dbo.Transaction_Details.ColorID = dbo.TblItemsColors.ColorID   WHERE     (dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 1 OR   dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 11 OR   dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 12 OR   dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 3 OR   dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 20 OR   dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 16 OR    dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 2 OR   dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 8 OR   dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 10 OR   dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 13 OR   dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 17 OR   dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 18 OR   dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 19 OR   dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = 15)   GROUP BY dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID, dbo.TblItems.ItemCode, dbo.TblItems.ItemName, dbo.TblItems.PartNo, dbo.Transactions.StoreID, dbo.TblStore.StoreName,   dbo.TblItems.GroupID, dbo.Transaction_Details.ColorID, dbo.TblItemsColors.ColorName, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemSize, dbo.Transaction_Details.order_no,    dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryGooutTime
AS
SELECT     dbo.tblPresentTime.*, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name AS Expr1, dbo.tblPresentTime.Present_Type AS Expr2
FROM         dbo.TblEmployee INNER JOIN
                      dbo.tblPresentTime ON dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID = dbo.tblPresentTime.Emp_ID
WHERE     (dbo.tblPresentTime.Present_Type = 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryGroupSearch
AS
SELECT     dbo.Groups.*, Groups_1.GroupName AS parentname
FROM         dbo.Groups LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.Groups Groups_1 ON dbo.Groups.ParentID = Groups_1.GroupID
WHERE     (dbo.Groups.GroupID <> 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryGuarantee
AS
SELECT     dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemSerial, 
                      dbo.TblItems.ItemName, dbo.Transaction_Details.guaranteeTime, dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID, dbo.Transactions.CusID, 
                      dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial
FROM         dbo.TblCustemers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = dbo.Transactions.CusID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transaction_Details ON dbo.TblItems.ItemID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID ON 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID
WHERE     (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 2) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 21)

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryGuaranteeAlram
AS
SELECT     QryGardComplete.QTY, QryGardComplete.ItemID, QryGardComplete.ItemCode, QryGardComplete.ItemName, QryGardComplete.ItemSerial, 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, dbo.TblItems.HaveGuarantee, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transaction_Details.guaranteeTime, 
                      DATEADD(Month, dbo.Transaction_Details.guaranteeTime, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date) AS ExpireDate, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.Groups.GroupName, dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity, 
                      QryGardComplete.HaveSerial
FROM         dbo.TblCustemers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = dbo.Transactions.CusID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Groups INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transaction_Details INNER JOIN
                      dbo.QryGardComplete(0) QryGardComplete ON dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID = QryGardComplete.ItemID AND 
                      dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemSerial = QryGardComplete.ItemSerial ON dbo.TblItems.ItemID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID AND 
                      dbo.TblItems.ItemID = QryGardComplete.ItemID ON dbo.Groups.GroupID = dbo.TblItems.GroupID ON 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID
WHERE     (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 1) AND (dbo.TblItems.HaveGuarantee = 1) AND (QryGardComplete.HaveSerial = 1) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 9) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 20) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 22)

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryInst
AS
SELECT     dbo.InstallMent.BasicAmmount, dbo.Notes.NoteID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial
FROM         dbo.Notes INNER JOIN
                      dbo.InstallMent ON dbo.Notes.NoteID = dbo.InstallMent.NoteID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.Notes.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryItemCart
AS
SELECT     QryItemCartReport.*
FROM         dbo.QryItemCartReport() QryItemCartReport

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryItemCart
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, 
                      dbo.TransactionTypes.TransactionTypeName, dbo.Transactions.PaymentType, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_HijriDate, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, 
                      dbo.TblStore.StoreName, dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemCase, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, 
                      dbo.TblItems.ItemID, dbo.TblItems.ItemCode, dbo.TblItems.ItemName, dbo.TblItems.HaveSerial, dbo.Groups.GroupName, dbo.Groups.GroupID, 
                      SUM(dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity) AS TransQty, dbo.Transactions.StoreID, TblStore_1.StoreName AS ToStoreName
FROM         dbo.TransactionTypes INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblStore INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCustemers RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = dbo.Transactions.CusID ON dbo.TblStore.StoreID = dbo.Transactions.StoreID ON 
                      dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Groups INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems ON dbo.Groups.GroupID = dbo.TblItems.GroupID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transaction_Details ON dbo.TblItems.ItemID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID ON 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions Transactions_1 ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = Transactions_1.ReturnID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TblStore TblStore_1 ON Transactions_1.StoreID = TblStore_1.StoreID
WHERE     (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 1) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 2) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 3) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 5) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 8) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 9) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 10) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 11) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 12) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 13) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 14)
GROUP BY dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, 
                      dbo.TransactionTypes.TransactionTypeName, dbo.Transactions.PaymentType, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_HijriDate, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, 
                      dbo.TblStore.StoreName, dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemCase, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, 
                      dbo.TblItems.ItemID, dbo.TblItems.ItemCode, dbo.TblItems.ItemName, dbo.TblItems.HaveSerial, dbo.Groups.GroupName, dbo.Groups.GroupID, 
                      dbo.Transactions.StoreID, TblStore_1.StoreName
ORDER BY dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryItemsProfit
AS
SELECT     SUM(dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemProfit) AS ProfitSum, dbo.TblItems.ItemID, dbo.TblItems.ItemCode, dbo.TblItems.ItemName, 
                      Transactions_1.Transaction_ID, Transactions_1.Transaction_Serial, Transactions_1.Transaction_Date, Transactions_1.Transaction_Type, 
                      Transactions_1.PaymentType, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemSerial, dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity, dbo.Transaction_Details.Price, 
                      dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemDiscountType, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemDiscount, dbo.Transaction_Details.CostPrice, 
                      dbo.Transaction_Details.CostTransID, Transactions_1.Transaction_Serial AS CostTransSerial, Transactions_1.Transaction_Date AS CostTransDate, 
                      dbo.TransactionTypes.TransactionTypeName AS CostTransType
FROM         dbo.TblItems INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions Transactions_1 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions Transactions_2 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transaction_Details ON Transactions_2.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID ON 
                      Transactions_1.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transaction_Details.CostTransID ON dbo.TblItems.ItemID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TransactionTypes ON Transactions_1.Transaction_Type = dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type
WHERE     (Transactions_1.Transaction_Type = 2)
GROUP BY dbo.TblItems.ItemID, dbo.TblItems.ItemCode, dbo.TblItems.ItemName, Transactions_1.Transaction_ID, Transactions_1.Transaction_Serial, 
                      Transactions_1.Transaction_Date, Transactions_1.Transaction_Type, Transactions_1.PaymentType, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemSerial, 
                      dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity, dbo.Transaction_Details.Price, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemDiscountType, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemDiscount, 
                      dbo.Transaction_Details.CostPrice, dbo.Transaction_Details.CostTransID, Transactions_1.Transaction_Serial, Transactions_1.Transaction_Date, 
                      dbo.TransactionTypes.TransactionTypeName

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryItemsReport
AS
SELECT     dbo.TblItems.ItemID, dbo.TblItems.ItemCode, dbo.TblItems.ItemName, dbo.TblItems.HaveSerial, dbo.Groups.GroupName, dbo.TblItems.PurchasePrice, 
                      dbo.TblItems.SallingPrice, dbo.TblItems.GroupID, dbo.TblItems.RequestLimit
FROM         dbo.Groups INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems ON dbo.Groups.GroupID = dbo.TblItems.GroupID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryKhsmvalue
AS
SELECT     0 AS sp1, '' AS sp2, Emp_Salary, KhsmEdafa_Value, KhsmEdafa_Date, Emp_ID, Emp_Name, Khsm_Value, KhsmEdafa_Type, Notes, 
                      CalculateValueType
FROM         dbo.QryKhasmMokafeaValue() QryKhasmMokafeaValue
WHERE     (KhsmEdafa_Type = 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryMaintananceReport AS SELECT     dbo.TblMaintenece.MaintananceID, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.TblMaintenece.DateGoIN, dbo.TblMaintenece.DateGoOUT,                        dbo.TblMaintenece.GoOut, dbo.TblMainteneceDetails.ItemID, dbo.TblMainteneceDetails.ItemSerial, dbo.TblMainteneceDetails.Cost,                        dbo.TblItems.ItemName, dbo.TblItems.HaveSerial, dbo.TblItems.ItemCode, dbo.TblMaintenece.PaymentType, dbo.TblMaintenece.MType,                        dbo.TblMaintenece.Transaction_ID, dbo.MaintenanceType.TypeName, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name, dbo.TblMainteneceDetails.NewSerial,                        dbo.TblMaintenece.CashCustomerName, dbo.TblMainteneceDetails.CustomerNotes, dbo.TblMainteneceDetails.EmpNotes,                        dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial FROM         dbo.TblCustemers INNER JOIN                       dbo.MaintenanceType INNER JOIN                       dbo.TblMaintenece ON dbo.MaintenanceType.TypeID = dbo.TblMaintenece.MType ON dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = dbo.TblMaintenece.CusID INNER JOIN                       dbo.TblItems INNER JOIN                       dbo.TblMainteneceDetails ON dbo.TblItems.ItemID = dbo.TblMainteneceDetails.ItemID ON                        dbo.TblMaintenece.MaintananceID = dbo.TblMainteneceDetails.MaintananceID INNER JOIN                       dbo.TblEmployee ON dbo.TblMaintenece.EmpID = dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN                       dbo.Transactions ON dbo.TblMaintenece.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryMaintanenceSearch
AS
SELECT DISTINCT 
                      dbo.TblMaintenece.MaintananceID, dbo.TblMaintenece.CusID, dbo.TblMaintenece.DateGoIN, dbo.TblMaintenece.DateGoOUT, 
                      dbo.TblMaintenece.GoOut, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.TblMaintenece.PaymentType, dbo.TblMaintenece.MType, 
                      dbo.TblMaintenece.CashCustomerName
FROM         dbo.TblMainteneceDetails INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblMaintenece ON dbo.TblMainteneceDetails.MaintananceID = dbo.TblMaintenece.MaintananceID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCustemers ON dbo.TblMaintenece.CusID = dbo.TblCustemers.CusID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryMaintenenceSearchItems
AS
SELECT     dbo.TblMainteneceNew.ItemID, dbo.TblMainteneceNew.ItemSerial, dbo.TblMainteneceNew.MaintananceID, dbo.TblMainteneceNew.CusID, 
                      dbo.TblMainteneceNew.DateGoIN, dbo.TblMainteneceNew.DateGoOUT, dbo.TblMainteneceNew.GoOut, dbo.TblItems.ItemName, 
                      dbo.TblCustemers.CusName
FROM         dbo.TblMainteneceNew INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCustemers ON dbo.TblMainteneceNew.CusID = dbo.TblCustemers.CusID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems ON dbo.TblMainteneceNew.ItemID = dbo.TblItems.ItemID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryManLastTicketTrans
AS
SELECT     MAX(dbo.TblMaintenece.MaintananceID) AS LastTrans, dbo.TblMainteneceDetails.TicketNO
FROM         dbo.TblMaintenece INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblMainteneceDetails ON dbo.TblMaintenece.MaintananceID = dbo.TblMainteneceDetails.MaintananceID
GROUP BY dbo.TblMainteneceDetails.TicketNO

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryManStockReport
AS
SELECT     QryManStockComplete.QTY, QryManStockComplete.ItemID, QryManStockComplete.ItemCode, QryManStockComplete.ItemName, 
                      QryManStockComplete.HaveSerial, QryManStockComplete.ItemSerial, QryManStockComplete.TicketNO, QryManStockComplete.StoreID, 
                      QryManStockComplete.StoreName, dbo.TblMaintenece.MaintananceID, dbo.TblMaintenece.DateGoIN, dbo.TblMaintenece.ReciptNumber, 
                      dbo.TblMaintenece.ManOperationTypeID
FROM         dbo.QryManStockComplete(0) QryManStockComplete INNER JOIN
                      dbo.QryManLastTicketTrans ON QryManStockComplete.TicketNO = dbo.QryManLastTicketTrans.TicketNO INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblMaintenece ON dbo.QryManLastTicketTrans.LastTrans = dbo.TblMaintenece.MaintananceID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryMokafeaValue
AS
SELECT     Emp_ID, Emp_Name, Emp_Salary, 0 AS sp1, '' AS sp2, Khsm_Value, KhsmEdafa_Type, KhsmEdafa_Date, KhsmEdafa_Value, Notes, 
                      CalculateValueType
FROM         dbo.QryKhasmMokafeaValue() QryKhasmMokafeaValue
WHERE     (KhsmEdafa_Type = 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryMovingItems
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transactions.StoreID, 
                      Transactions_1.StoreID AS ToStoreID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial
FROM         dbo.TblStore INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblStore TblStore_1 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions Transactions_1 ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = Transactions_1.ReturnID ON TblStore_1.StoreID = Transactions_1.StoreID ON 
                      dbo.TblStore.StoreID = dbo.Transactions.StoreID
WHERE     (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 10)
ORDER BY dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryMovingItemsReport
AS
SELECT     dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.TblStore.StoreName, dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID, 
                      dbo.TblItems.ItemName, dbo.TblItems.ItemCode, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemCase, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemSerial, 
                      dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity, dbo.TblItems.HaveSerial, Transactions_1.StoreID, TblStore_1.StoreName AS secondStore
FROM         dbo.TblStore INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblStore TblStore_1 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions Transactions_1 ON TblStore_1.StoreID = Transactions_1.StoreID ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = Transactions_1.ReturnID ON 
                      dbo.TblStore.StoreID = dbo.Transactions.StoreID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transaction_Details ON dbo.TblItems.ItemID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID ON 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryNotesBoxes
AS
SELECT     dbo.Notes.NoteID, dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Notes.NoteType
FROM         dbo.TblBoxesData INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Notes ON dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxID = dbo.Notes.BoxID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.Notes.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID
WHERE     (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryOpenBalanceSearch
AS
SELECT     dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, dbo.Transactions.StoreID, 
                      dbo.TblStore.StoreName, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial
FROM         dbo.TblStore INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.TblStore.StoreID = dbo.Transactions.StoreID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transaction_Details ON dbo.TblItems.ItemID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID ON 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID
GROUP BY dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, dbo.Transactions.StoreID, 
                      dbo.TblStore.StoreName, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial
HAVING      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 3)

create view QRyOrdersData as   SELECT DISTINCT order_no, MAX(OrderArrivalDate) AS OrderArrivalDateMax  From dbo.Transaction_Details    GROUP BY order_no   Having (Not (order_no Is Null)) And (Not (Max(OrderArrivalDate) Is Null))

CREATE VIEW dbo.QRYORDERSQTY
AS
SELECT     dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID, dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity, dbo.Transaction_Details.order_no, dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID, 
                      dbo.Transaction_Details.order_id, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transactions.CusID, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, 
                      dbo.Transaction_Details.Price
FROM         dbo.Transaction_Details INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCustemers ON dbo.Transactions.CusID = dbo.TblCustemers.CusID
WHERE     (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 6)

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryOutOrders
AS
SELECT     dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemCase, 
                      dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemSerial, dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity, dbo.Transaction_Details.Price, dbo.TblItems.ItemName, dbo.TblItems.ItemID, 
                      dbo.TblItems.HaveSerial, dbo.Transactions.StoreID, dbo.TblStore.StoreName, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial, dbo.Transactions.WorkOrderID, 
                      dbo.TblItems.ItemCode
FROM         dbo.TblStore INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.TblStore.StoreID = dbo.Transactions.StoreID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transaction_Details ON dbo.TblItems.ItemID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID ON 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID
WHERE     (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 8) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 17) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 18)

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryOutOrderTotal
AS
SELECT     dbo.TblWorkOrdersData.WorkOrderDate, dbo.TblWorkOrdersData.WorkOrderName, 
                      SUM(dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity * dbo.Transaction_Details.Price) AS TotallOrder, dbo.TblWorkOrdersData.WorkOrderID, 
                      dbo.TblWorkOrdersData.WorkOrderState, dbo.TblWorkOrdersData.WorkOrderDatecls, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type
FROM         dbo.TblStore INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.TblStore.StoreID = dbo.Transactions.StoreID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transaction_Details ON dbo.TblItems.ItemID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID ON 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblWorkOrdersData ON dbo.Transactions.WorkOrderID = dbo.TblWorkOrdersData.WorkOrderID
GROUP BY dbo.TblWorkOrdersData.WorkOrderDate, dbo.TblWorkOrdersData.WorkOrderName, dbo.TblWorkOrdersData.WorkOrderID, 
                      dbo.TblWorkOrdersData.WorkOrderState, dbo.TblWorkOrdersData.WorkOrderDatecls, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryPostedTransactions
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT Transaction_ID
FROM         (SELECT     dbo.QryDebitTransactionsValues.Transaction_ID, dbo.QryDebitTransactionsValues.Transaction_Serial, 
                                              dbo.QryDebitTransactionsValues.Transaction_Date, dbo.QryReleasedTransactions.NoteType, 
                                              dbo.QryReleasedTransactions.SumNote_Value, dbo.QryDebitTransactionsValues.Note_Value, 
                                              dbo.QryReleasedTransactions.Transaction_Type
                        FROM         dbo.QryReleasedTransactions INNER JOIN
                                              dbo.QryDebitTransactionsValues ON dbo.QryReleasedTransactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.QryDebitTransactionsValues.Transaction_ID) 
                      XTable
WHERE     (Note_Value = SumNote_Value)
ORDER BY Transaction_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryPostedTransNotes
AS
SELECT     dbo.Notes.NoteID, dbo.Notes.NoteDate, dbo.Notes.NoteType, dbo.Notes.NoteSerial, dbo.Notes.Note_Value, dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxName, dbo.TblUsers.UserName, 
                      dbo.Notes.Transaction_ID
FROM         dbo.TblUsers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblBoxesData INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Notes ON dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxID = dbo.Notes.BoxID ON dbo.TblUsers.UserID = dbo.Notes.UserID
WHERE     (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 4 OR
                      dbo.Notes.NoteType = 5 OR
                      dbo.Notes.NoteType = 9 OR
                      dbo.Notes.NoteType = 1 OR
                      dbo.Notes.NoteType = 10 OR
                      dbo.Notes.NoteType = 2000 OR
                      dbo.Notes.NoteType = 2001) AND (dbo.Notes.Transaction_ID IS NOT NULL)

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryPostFullTransactionsNotes
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT MAX(dbo.Notes.NoteID) AS PostNoteID, dbo.QryPostedTransactions.Transaction_ID
FROM         dbo.QryPostedTransactions INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Notes ON dbo.QryPostedTransactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Notes.Transaction_ID
WHERE     (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 4) OR
                      (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 5) OR
                      (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 9) OR
                      (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 10)
GROUP BY dbo.QryPostedTransactions.Transaction_ID
ORDER BY dbo.QryPostedTransactions.Transaction_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryPresentDay
AS
SELECT     Present_ID, Present_Hour, Emp_ID, PresentDate, Present_Type, Present_Minute, Present_Time, Present_Code, DATENAME(weekday, PresentDate) 
                      AS [Day]
FROM         dbo.tblPresentTime

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryPresentTime
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.QryBringTime.PresentDate, dbo.QryBringTime.Emp_ID, dbo.QryBringTime.Emp_Name, dbo.QryBringTime.Present_Hour, 
                      dbo.QryBringTime.Present_Minute, dbo.QryBringTime.Present_Time, dbo.QryGooutTime.Present_Hour AS GooutHour, 
                      dbo.QryGooutTime.Present_Minute AS GooutMinute, dbo.QryGooutTime.Present_Time AS GooutTime
FROM         dbo.QryBringTime LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.QryGooutTime ON dbo.QryBringTime.PresentDate = dbo.QryGooutTime.PresentDate AND 
                      dbo.QryBringTime.Emp_ID = dbo.QryGooutTime.Emp_ID
ORDER BY dbo.QryBringTime.PresentDate

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryPriceList
AS
SELECT     *
FROM         (SELECT     TblItems.ItemID, TblItems.ItemCode, TblItems.ItemName, TblItems.GroupID, TblItems.SallingPrice, ItemsPrice.Item_ID, ItemsPrice.[FROM], 
                                              ItemsPrice.[TO], ItemsPrice.Price, SUM(QryGARDShort.QTY) AS Quantity, TblItems.CustomerPrice, TblItems.DealerPrice
                        FROM         (TblItems LEFT JOIN
                                              dbo.QryGARDShort() QryGARDShort ON TblItems.ItemID = QryGARDShort.ItemID) LEFT JOIN
                                              ItemsPrice ON TblItems.ItemID = ItemsPrice.Item_ID
                        GROUP BY TblItems.ItemID, TblItems.ItemCode, TblItems.ItemName, TblItems.GroupID, TblItems.SallingPrice, ItemsPrice.Item_ID, ItemsPrice.[FROM], 
                                              ItemsPrice.[TO], ItemsPrice.Price, TblItems.CustomerPrice, TblItems.DealerPrice) XTABLE
WHERE     (Quantity > 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryPriceListTree
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.TblItems.ItemID, dbo.TblItems.ItemCode, dbo.TblItems.ItemName, dbo.TblItems.SallingPrice, dbo.ItemsPrice.Item_ID, 
                      dbo.ItemsPrice.[From], dbo.ItemsPrice.[To], dbo.ItemsPrice.Price, SUM(QryGARDShort.QTY) AS Quantity, dbo.TblItems.CustomerPrice, 
                      dbo.TblItems.DealerPrice, dbo.Groups.GroupID, dbo.Groups.GroupName, dbo.Groups.ParentID, dbo.Groups.GroupCode
FROM         dbo.TblItems RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.Groups ON dbo.TblItems.GroupID = dbo.Groups.GroupID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.QryGARDShort() QryGARDShort ON dbo.TblItems.ItemID = QryGARDShort.ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.ItemsPrice ON dbo.TblItems.ItemID = dbo.ItemsPrice.Item_ID
GROUP BY dbo.TblItems.ItemID, dbo.TblItems.ItemCode, dbo.TblItems.ItemName, dbo.TblItems.SallingPrice, dbo.ItemsPrice.Item_ID, dbo.ItemsPrice.[From], 
                      dbo.ItemsPrice.[To], dbo.ItemsPrice.Price, dbo.TblItems.CustomerPrice, dbo.TblItems.DealerPrice, dbo.Groups.GroupID, dbo.Groups.GroupName, 
                      dbo.Groups.ParentID, dbo.Groups.GroupCode
ORDER BY dbo.Groups.ParentID, dbo.Groups.GroupID, dbo.TblItems.ItemID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryPrint
AS
SELECT     QryTotal.*, dbo.QryTotalPrice.inv_value AS inv_value
FROM         dbo.QryTotal() QryTotal INNER JOIN
                      dbo.QryTotalPrice ON QryTotal.Transaction_ID = dbo.QryTotalPrice.Transaction_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryPyment
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.TblEmpAdvance.AdvanceDate, dbo.TblEmpAdvance.Emp_ID, dbo.TblEmpAdvance.AdvanceValue, 
                      dbo.TblEmpAdvance.AdvanceType, dbo.TblEmpAdvanceDetails.PartNO, dbo.TblEmpAdvanceDetails.PartValue, dbo.TblEmpAdvanceDetails.PartDate, 
                      dbo.TblEmpAdvanceDetails.TableID, dbo.TblEmpAdvanceDetails.OrgTableID, dbo.TblEmpAdvanceDetails.Payed, dbo.TblEmpAdvance.AdvanceID, 
                      dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name
FROM         dbo.TblEmpAdvance INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblEmpAdvanceDetails ON dbo.TblEmpAdvance.AdvanceID = dbo.TblEmpAdvanceDetails.AdvanceID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblEmployee ON dbo.TblEmpAdvance.Emp_ID = dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID
WHERE     (dbo.TblEmpAdvanceDetails.Payed = 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryReceiptParts
AS
SELECT     dbo.ReceiptQest.ReceiptID, dbo.ReceiptQest.Cust_ID, dbo.ReceiptQest.ReceiptType, dbo.ReceiptQest.ReceiptDate, dbo.ReceiptQest.PartCount, 
                      dbo.ReceiptQest.Total, dbo.ReceiptQest.PaymentMoney, dbo.ReceiptQest.User_ID, dbo.ReceiptQest.BoxID, dbo.TblUsers.UserName, 
                      dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxName, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial, 
                      dbo.TransactionTypes.TransactionTypeName, dbo.ReceiptQest.OperationType, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type
FROM         dbo.TransactionTypes INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblUsers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCustemers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.ReceiptQest INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblBoxesData ON dbo.ReceiptQest.BoxID = dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Notes INNER JOIN
                      dbo.InstallMent INNER JOIN
                      dbo.InstallMentDetails INNER JOIN
                      dbo.InstallmentDet_Junc_Receipt ON dbo.InstallMentDetails.QestID = dbo.InstallmentDet_Junc_Receipt.QestID ON 
                      dbo.InstallMent.PartID = dbo.InstallMentDetails.PartID ON dbo.Notes.NoteID = dbo.InstallMent.NoteID ON 
                      dbo.ReceiptQest.ReceiptID = dbo.InstallmentDet_Junc_Receipt.ReceiptID ON dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = dbo.ReceiptQest.Cust_ID ON 
                      dbo.TblUsers.UserID = dbo.ReceiptQest.User_ID ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Notes.Transaction_ID ON 
                      dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryReleasedTransactions
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, dbo.TransactionTypes.TransactionTypeName, dbo.Transactions.PaymentType, dbo.Transactions.CusID, 
                      QryTransactionsTotal.TransSum, dbo.Notes.NoteType, SUM(dbo.Notes.Note_Value) AS SumNote_Value
FROM         dbo.TransactionTypes INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type = dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Notes ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Notes.Transaction_ID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.QryTransactionsTotal() QryTransactionsTotal ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_ID
GROUP BY dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, 
                      dbo.TransactionTypes.TransactionTypeName, dbo.Transactions.PaymentType, dbo.Transactions.CusID, QryTransactionsTotal.TransSum, 
                      dbo.Notes.NoteType
HAVING      (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 4) OR
                      (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 5) OR
                      (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 9) OR
                      (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 10)
ORDER BY dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryRepAbsent
AS
SELECT     dbo.tblAbsent.Abs_Date, dbo.tblJunkAbsent.Emp_ID, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name, dbo.tblVacancy.Vac_Name, dbo.tblAbsent.Abs_Code AS rx, 
                      dbo.tblAbsent.Abs_Code AS r, dbo.tblAbsent.Abs_Code AS rr, dbo.tblAbsent.Abs_Code AS rrr, dbo.tblAbsent.Abs_Code AS rrrr
FROM         dbo.tblAbsent INNER JOIN
                      dbo.tblVacancy INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblEmployee INNER JOIN
                      dbo.tblJunkAbsent ON dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID = dbo.tblJunkAbsent.Emp_ID ON dbo.tblVacancy.Vac_ID = dbo.tblJunkAbsent.Vac_ID ON 
                      dbo.tblAbsent.Abs_ID = dbo.tblJunkAbsent.Abs_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryRepeatSalling
AS
SELECT     dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemSerial, 
                      dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID, dbo.TblItems.ItemName, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type
FROM         dbo.TblCustemers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = dbo.Transactions.CusID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transaction_Details ON dbo.TblItems.ItemID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID ON 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryRepEmpSalesProfit
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name, QryTransactionsTotal.TransSum, QryTransactionsTotal.TransProfit, 
                      dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Comm, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_ID, QryTransactionsTotal.TransNet, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Serial, 
                      QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Date, SUM(QryTransactionsTotal_1.TransSum) AS ReturnSum, dbo.TblEmployee.EmpProfitCom
FROM         dbo.TblEmployee INNER JOIN
                      dbo.QryTransactionsTotal() QryTransactionsTotal ON dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID = QryTransactionsTotal.Emp_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.QryTransactionsTotal() QryTransactionsTotal_1 ON QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_ID = QryTransactionsTotal_1.ReturnID
GROUP BY dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name, QryTransactionsTotal.TransSum, QryTransactionsTotal.TransProfit, 
                      dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Comm, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_ID, QryTransactionsTotal.TransNet, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Serial, 
                      QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Date, dbo.TblEmployee.EmpProfitCom

CREATE VIEW dbo.QRYResevedOrderQty
AS
SELECT     dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID, dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity, dbo.Transaction_Details.order_no, dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID, 
                      dbo.Transaction_Details.order_id, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transactions.CusID, 
                      dbo.TblCustemers.CusName
FROM         dbo.Transaction_Details INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCustemers ON dbo.Transactions.CusID = dbo.TblCustemers.CusID
WHERE     (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 22)

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryReTransactionsReport AS SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_ID, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Date, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName,                        dbo.TblStore.StoreName, QryTransactionsTotal.Trans_DiscountType, QryTransactionsTotal.Trans_Discount, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Serial,                        QryTransactionsTotal.PaymentType, QryTransactionsTotal.CusID, QryTransactionsTotal.TaxFound, QryTransactionsTotal.TaxValue,                        QryTransactionsTotal.TransSum, QryTransactionsTotal.TotalAfterTax, QryTransactionsTotal.TransNet, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Type FROM         dbo.TblCustemers RIGHT OUTER JOIN                       dbo.TblStore INNER JOIN                       dbo.QryTransactionsTotal() QryTransactionsTotal ON dbo.TblStore.StoreID = QryTransactionsTotal.StoreID ON                        dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = QryTransactionsTotal.CusID WHERE     (QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Type = 5) OR                       (QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Type = 9)

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryReturn
AS
SELECT     dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, SUM(dbo.Transaction_Details.Price) 
                      AS Total, dbo.TblStore.StoreName, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial
FROM         dbo.TblStore INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCustemers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = dbo.Transactions.CusID ON dbo.TblStore.StoreID = dbo.Transactions.StoreID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transaction_Details ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID
GROUP BY dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, dbo.TblStore.StoreName, 
                      dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial
HAVING      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 5)

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryReturnSalling
AS
SELECT     dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, SUM(dbo.Transaction_Details.Price) 
                      AS Total, dbo.TblStore.StoreName, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial
FROM         dbo.TblStore INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCustemers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = dbo.Transactions.CusID ON dbo.TblStore.StoreID = dbo.Transactions.StoreID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transaction_Details ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID
GROUP BY dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, dbo.TblStore.StoreName, 
                      dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial
HAVING      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 9)

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryRptBoxesDailyTrans
AS
SELECT     BoxID, BoxName, NoteDate, StartBal, SumIn, SumOut, EndBal
FROM         dbo.QryBoxDailyTrans() QryBoxDailyTrans

CREATE VIEW dbo.QrySalaryvalua
AS
SELECT     dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID, dbo.VIEW13.TotaDay, dbo.LateAddTime.late, dbo.LateAddTime.addtime, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name, 
                      dbo.tblKhsmEdafa.KhsmEdafa_Date, dbo.tblKhsmEdafa.KhsmEdafa_Type, dbo.tblKhsmEdafa.KhsmEdafa_Value, dbo.tblKhsmEdafa.KhsmEdafa_Code, 
                      dbo.tblKhsmEdafa.Notes, dbo.tblKhsmEdafa.RcDate, dbo.tblKhsmEdafa.CalculateValueType, dbo.tblKhsmEdafa.UserID, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary, 
                      dbo.TblEmployee.InsuranceValue
FROM         dbo.TblEmployee LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.tblKhsmEdafa ON dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID = dbo.tblKhsmEdafa.Emp_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.LateAddTime ON dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID = dbo.LateAddTime.Emp_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.VIEW13 ON dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID = dbo.VIEW13.Emp_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QrySalaryvalua
AS
SELECT     dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary, dbo.tblKhsmEdafa.KhsmEdafa_Date, 
                      dbo.tblKhsmEdafa.KhsmEdafa_Type, dbo.tblKhsmEdafa.Notes, dbo.tblKhsmEdafa.KhsmEdafa_Value, dbo.tblKhsmEdafa.RcDate, 
                      dbo.tblKhsmEdafa.CalculateValueType, dbo.tblKhsmEdafa.KhsmEdafa_ID
FROM         dbo.TblEmployee LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.tblKhsmEdafa ON dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID = dbo.tblKhsmEdafa.Emp_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QrySalesProfit
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT SUM(dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemProfit) AS ProfitSum, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial, 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, dbo.Transactions.PaymentType, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Code, 
                      dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name, QryTransactionsTotal.TransSum, dbo.TblCustemers.CusID, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, 
                      QryTransactionsTotal.TransNet
FROM         dbo.TblEmployee INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions INNER JOIN
                      dbo.QryTransactionsTotal() QryTransactionsTotal ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_ID ON 
                      dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID = dbo.Transactions.Emp_ID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transaction_Details ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCustemers ON QryTransactionsTotal.CusID = dbo.TblCustemers.CusID
WHERE     (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 2) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 21)
GROUP BY dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, 
                      dbo.Transactions.PaymentType, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Code, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name, QryTransactionsTotal.TransSum, 
                      dbo.TblCustemers.CusID, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, QryTransactionsTotal.TransNet
ORDER BY dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QrySliceCnH_M
AS
SELECT     CONVERT(float, Late_Time) * 60 AS TotalMinute, Late_Type, Discount, Dis_Type
FROM         dbo.tblSliceDiscount

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryTemplate
AS
SELECT     dbo.Templates.TemplateID, dbo.Templates.TemplateName, dbo.Templates.[Date], dbo.Templates.TemplateType, dbo.Templates.TemplateTime, 
                      dbo.Template_Details.ItemID, dbo.TblItems.ItemCode, dbo.TblItems.ItemName, dbo.Template_Details.Quantity, dbo.Template_Details.Price, 
                      dbo.Template_Details.ItemDiscountType, dbo.Template_Details.ItemDiscount, dbo.Template_Details.ItemCase
FROM         dbo.Templates INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Template_Details ON dbo.TblItems.ItemID = dbo.Template_Details.ItemID ON dbo.Templates.TemplateID = dbo.Template_Details.TemplateID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryTotalPrice
AS
SELECT     Transaction_ID, SUM(Total) AS inv_value
FROM         dbo.QryTotal() QryTotal
GROUP BY Transaction_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryTotLateDiscountValue
AS
SELECT     dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name, dbo.tblPresentTime.PresentDate, dbo.tblPresentTime.GenPresentTime, 
                      dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Salary, dbo.tblPresentTime.LateTimeDiscountValue
FROM         dbo.TblEmployee INNER JOIN
                      dbo.tblPresentTime ON dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID = dbo.tblPresentTime.Emp_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.QryTransactionaBoxes
AS
SELECT     dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Notes.NoteID, dbo.Notes.BoxID, dbo.Notes.NoteType
FROM         dbo.Transactions INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Notes ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Notes.Transaction_ID
WHERE     (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 0)

CREATE VIEW dbo.QRyTransSearch
AS
SELECT     dbo.Transactions.*, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName AS Expr1, dbo.TblStore.StoreName AS Expr2
FROM         dbo.TblStore RIGHT OUTER JOIN

CREATE VIEW dbo.ReceiptQestForBill
AS

                      dbo.InstallMentDetails.DueDate

CREATE VIEW dbo.RepAccountGuide

CREATE VIEW dbo.ReplacedItems
AS
SELECT     dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.ReturnID, dbo.Transactions.MaintenanceID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, 
                      dbo.Transactions.StoreID, Transaction_Details_1.ItemCase, Transaction_Details_1.ItemSerial, Transaction_Details_1.Quantity, 
                      Transaction_Details_1.Price, Transaction_Details_1.ItemDiscountType, Transaction_Details_1.ItemDiscount, dbo.TblItems.ItemName, 
                      dbo.TblItems.ItemID, dbo.TblItems.HaveSerial, Transaction_Details_1.ItemSerial AS newSerial, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, 
                      dbo.Transactions.CusID, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, Transactions_2.Transaction_Serial
FROM         dbo.TblCustemers RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.Transaction_Details Transaction_Details_1 INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions Transactions_1 ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = Transactions_1.ReturnID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transaction_Details Transaction_Details_2 ON dbo.TblItems.ItemID = Transaction_Details_2.Item_ID ON 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = Transaction_Details_2.Transaction_ID ON 
                      Transaction_Details_1.Transaction_ID = Transactions_1.Transaction_ID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions Transactions_2 ON dbo.Transactions.ReturnID = Transactions_2.Transaction_ID ON 
                      dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = dbo.Transactions.CusID
WHERE     (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 12)

CREATE VIEW dbo.ReportBuyItems
AS
SELECT     dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transactions.CusID, 
                      dbo.Transactions.StoreID, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemCase, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemSerial, 
                      dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity, dbo.Transaction_Details.Price, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemDiscountType, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemDiscount, 
                      dbo.TblItems.ItemName, dbo.TblItems.ItemID, dbo.TblItems.HaveSerial
FROM         dbo.TblCustemers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = dbo.Transactions.CusID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transaction_Details ON dbo.TblItems.ItemID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID ON 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID
WHERE     (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 1)

create view ReportBuyTime_Client as   SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_ID, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Date, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.TblStore.StoreName,                      QryTransactionsTotal.Trans_DiscountType, QryTransactionsTotal.Trans_Discount, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Serial, QryTransactionsTotal.PaymentType,                      QryTransactionsTotal.CusID, QryTransactionsTotal.TaxFound, QryTransactionsTotal.TaxValue, QryTransactionsTotal.TransSum, QryTransactionsTotal.TotalAfterTax,                      QryTransactionsTotal.TransNet, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Type, dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxID, dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxName, QryTransactionsTotal.StoreID,                      QryTransactionsTotal.Emp_id , dbo.TblEmployee.emp_Name, dbo.Transactions.NoteSerial, dbo.Transactions.NoteSerial1   FROM         dbo.Transactions INNER JOIN                      dbo.TblStore INNER JOIN                      dbo.QryTransactionsTotal() QryTransactionsTotal ON dbo.TblStore.StoreID = QryTransactionsTotal.StoreID ON                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_ID INNER JOIN                      dbo.TblEmployee ON QryTransactionsTotal.Emp_ID = dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN                      dbo.TblCustemers ON QryTransactionsTotal.CusID = dbo.TblCustemers.CusID LEFT OUTER JOIN                      dbo.QryNotesBoxes ON QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_ID = dbo.QryNotesBoxes.Transaction_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN                      dbo.TblBoxesData ON dbo.QryNotesBoxes.BoxID = dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxID     WHERE     (QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Type = 2 OR                      QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Type = 21)         ORDER BY QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Date

CREATE VIEW dbo.ReportMaintence
AS
SELECT     dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.TblMainteneceNew.MaintananceID, dbo.TblMainteneceNew.CusID, dbo.TblMainteneceNew.DateGoIN, 
                      SUM(dbo.TblMainteneceNew.Cost) AS Summtion
FROM         dbo.TblCustemers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblMainteneceNew ON dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = dbo.TblMainteneceNew.CusID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems ON dbo.TblMainteneceNew.ItemID = dbo.TblItems.ItemID
GROUP BY dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.TblMainteneceNew.MaintananceID, dbo.TblMainteneceNew.CusID, dbo.TblMainteneceNew.DateGoIN, 
                      dbo.TblMainteneceNew.Cost

CREATE VIEW dbo.ReportSallingItems
AS
SELECT     dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transactions.CusID, 
                      dbo.Transactions.StoreID, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemCase, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemSerial, 
                      dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity, dbo.Transaction_Details.Price, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemDiscountType, dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemDiscount, 
                      dbo.TblItems.ItemName, dbo.TblItems.ItemID, dbo.TblItems.HaveSerial, dbo.Transactions.PaymentType
FROM         dbo.TblCustemers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = dbo.Transactions.CusID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transaction_Details ON dbo.TblItems.ItemID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID ON 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID
WHERE     (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 2) OR
                      (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 21)

CREATE VIEW dbo.ReportSallingTax
AS
SELECT     dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date, dbo.Transactions.CusID, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, 
                      dbo.Transactions.Trans_DiscountType, dbo.Transactions.Trans_Discount, QryTransactionsTotal.TransSum AS Summition, dbo.Transactions.TaxFound, 
                      dbo.Transactions.TaxValue, dbo.Transactions.PaymentType, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type
FROM         dbo.TblCustemers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = dbo.Transactions.CusID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.QryTransactionsTotal() QryTransactionsTotal ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_ID
WHERE     (dbo.Transactions.TaxFound = 1) AND (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 2 OR
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.ReportSallingTime
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_ID, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Date, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, 
                      dbo.TblStore.StoreName, QryTransactionsTotal.Trans_DiscountType, QryTransactionsTotal.Trans_Discount, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Serial, 
                      QryTransactionsTotal.PaymentType, QryTransactionsTotal.CusID, QryTransactionsTotal.TaxFound, QryTransactionsTotal.TaxValue, 
                      QryTransactionsTotal.TransSum, QryTransactionsTotal.TotalAfterTax, QryTransactionsTotal.TransNet, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Type, 
                      dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxID, dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxName, dbo.Transactions.SaleType, QryTransactionsTotal.StoreID, QryTransactionsTotal.Emp_ID, 
                      dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name
FROM         dbo.Transactions INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblStore INNER JOIN
                      dbo.QryTransactionsTotal() QryTransactionsTotal ON dbo.TblStore.StoreID = QryTransactionsTotal.StoreID ON 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_ID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblEmployee ON QryTransactionsTotal.Emp_ID = dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.QryNotesBoxes ON QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_ID = dbo.QryNotesBoxes.Transaction_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCustemers ON QryTransactionsTotal.CusID = dbo.TblCustemers.CusID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TblBoxesData ON dbo.QryNotesBoxes.BoxID = dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxID
WHERE     (QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Type = 2) OR
                      (QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Type = 21)

CREATE VIEW dbo.RequestItems
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.TblItems.RequestLimit, dbo.TblItems.PurchasePrice, dbo.TblItems.ItemID, dbo.TblItems.ItemCode, dbo.TblItems.ItemName, 
                      QryRequestItems.QTY, QryRequestItems.StoreID, QryRequestItems.StoreName, dbo.TblItems.GroupID, dbo.TblItems.LastUpdate, 
                      dbo.Groups.GroupName
FROM         dbo.TblItems INNER JOIN
                      dbo.QryRequestItems() QryRequestItems ON dbo.TblItems.ItemID = QryRequestItems.ItemID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Groups ON dbo.TblItems.GroupID = dbo.Groups.GroupID
WHERE     (dbo.TblItems.RequestLimit > 0)
ORDER BY dbo.TblItems.ItemCode

CREATE VIEW dbo.RetAsset
AS
SELECT     dbo.AssetType.ID, dbo.AssetType.Name, dbo.AssetType.Remarks, dbo.AssetType.Account_Code, dbo.Notes.NoteType, dbo.Notes.NoteSerial, 
                      dbo.Notes.Note_Value
FROM         dbo.AssetType INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Notes ON dbo.AssetType.ID = dbo.Notes.Transaction_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.RptComanyDebitCreditValues
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT *
FROM         (SELECT     CompanyDebitValues.*, '0' AS Type
                        FROM         dbo.CompanyDebitValues() CompanyDebitValues
                        UNION
                        SELECT     CompanyCreditValues.*, '1' AS Type
                        FROM         dbo.CompanyCreditValues() CompanyCreditValues) XTable
ORDER BY Type DESC, NoteID

CREATE VIEW dbo.RptCusTransactions
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_ID, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Date, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, 
                      dbo.TblStore.StoreName, QryTransactionsTotal.Trans_DiscountType, QryTransactionsTotal.Trans_Discount, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Serial, 
                      QryTransactionsTotal.PaymentType, QryTransactionsTotal.CusID, QryTransactionsTotal.TaxFound, QryTransactionsTotal.TaxValue, 
                      QryTransactionsTotal.TransSum, QryTransactionsTotal.TotalAfterTax, QryTransactionsTotal.TransNet, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Type
FROM         dbo.TblCustemers RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TblStore INNER JOIN
                      dbo.QryTransactionsTotal() QryTransactionsTotal ON dbo.TblStore.StoreID = QryTransactionsTotal.StoreID ON 
                      dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = QryTransactionsTotal.CusID

CREATE VIEW dbo.RptItemTransCus
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT Transaction_ID, Transaction_Serial, Transaction_Type, TransactionTypeName, Transaction_Date, 
                      dbo.QryOneTransactionTotal(Transaction_ID) AS TransTotal, PaymentType, CusID, CusName, StoreID, StoreName, GroupID, GroupName, Item_ID, 
                      ItemCode, ItemName, HaveSerial, ItemCase, CONVERT(Decimal(38, 2), SUM(Quantity)) AS XQty, SUM(Price) AS XPrice, AVG(Price) AS AvgPrice, 
                      ItemDiscount, ItemDiscountType
FROM         dbo.ItemsTrans
GROUP BY Transaction_ID, Transaction_Serial, Transaction_Type, TransactionTypeName, Transaction_Date, PaymentType, CusID, CusName, StoreID, 
                      StoreName, GroupID, GroupName, Item_ID, ItemCode, ItemName, HaveSerial, ItemCase, Price, ItemDiscount, ItemDiscountType
ORDER BY Item_ID, Transaction_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.[RptLedger_Sub] AS 
SELECT 
    N.ChqueNum,
    N.ManualNo,
    DEV.Double_Entry_Vouchers_ID,
    DEV.Credit_Or_Debit,
    DEV.Value AS DEV_Value,
    DEV.RecordDateH,
    DEV.Account_Code,
    DEV.Double_Entry_Vouchers_Description AS DEV_DES,
    DEV.Double_Entry_Vouchers_Descriptione AS DevDESE,
    A.Account_Name,
    DEV.DEV_ID_Line_No,
    NT.NotesTypeName,
    DEV.UserID,
    U.UserName,
    DEV.RecordDate,
    DEV.Notes_ID,
    DEV.ReceiptID,
    DEV.OperaID,
    DEV.Transaction_ID,
    T.Transaction_Serial,
    T.Transaction_Date,
    TT.TransactionTypeName,
    DEV.PostedDate,
    DEV.PostedUserID,
    DEV.Account_Interval_ID,
    N.NoteDate,
    N.NoteType,
    N.NoteSerial,
    N.Note_Value,
    A.Account_Serial,
    A.Account_NameEng,
    A.Parent_Account_Code,
    A.opening_balance,
    A.opening_balance_type,
    A.Branch,
    A.Sum_account,
    A.cost_center,
    A.currenct_code,
    N.Remark,
    N.note_value_by_characters,
    N.foxy_no,
    DEV.DEV_ID_Line_No1,
    NT.NotesTypeNamee,
    TT.TransactionEnglishName,
    N.NoteSerial1,
    DEV.branch_id,
    B.ActivityTypeId,
    DEV.notes_all,
    B.branch_name,
    B.branch_namee,
    DEV.Posted,
    DEV.valuee AS DEV_ValueE,
    DEV.currency,
    DEV.rate,
    B.RegionID,
    S.name,
    S.namee,
    DEV.DescAccount,
    DEV.NextAccount_Code,
    DEV.project_id,
    DEV.opr_fullcode,
    DEV.projectid,
    DEV.IsHiddenInv,
    DEV.operid,
    DEV.pandid,
    DEV.Aqarid,
    AQ.aqarname,
    AQ.aqarNo,
    T.TaxFound,
    DEV.RelatedEntityType, DEV.RelatedEntityID,
    T.order_no,T.CBoBasedON 
FROM dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS DEV
INNER JOIN dbo.TblUsers U ON U.UserID = DEV.UserID
INNER JOIN dbo.TblBranchesData B ON B.branch_id = DEV.branch_id
LEFT JOIN dbo.TblAqar AQ ON AQ.Aqarid = DEV.Aqarid
LEFT JOIN dbo.ACCOUNTS A ON A.Account_Code = DEV.Account_Code
LEFT JOIN dbo.TblSection S ON S.Id = B.RegionID
LEFT JOIN dbo.Notes N ON N.NoteID = DEV.Notes_ID
LEFT JOIN dbo.TblNotesTypes NT ON NT.NotesType = N.NoteType
LEFT JOIN dbo.Transactions T ON T.Transaction_ID = DEV.Transaction_ID
LEFT JOIN dbo.TransactionTypes TT ON TT.Transaction_Type = T.Transaction_Type
WHERE DEV.Posted IS NULL

dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.Credit_Or_Debit,          dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.[Value] AS DEV_Value,          dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.RecordDateH,          dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.Account_Code,          dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.Double_Entry_Vouchers_Description AS DEV_DES,          dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.Double_Entry_Vouchers_Descriptione AS DevDESE,          dbo.ACCOUNTS.Account_Name,          dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.DEV_ID_Line_No,          dbo.TblNotesTypes.NotesTypeName,          dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.UserID,          dbo.TblUsers.UserName,          dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.RecordDate,          dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.Notes_ID,          dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.ReceiptID,          dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.OperaID,          dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.Transaction_ID,                 dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial,                 dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Date,                 dbo.TransactionTypes.TransactionTypeName,                 dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.PostedDate,                 dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.PostedUserID,                 dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.Account_Interval_ID,                 dbo.Notes.NoteDate,                 dbo.Notes.NoteType,                 dbo.Notes.NoteSerial,                 DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.value  Note_Value,                 dbo.ACCOUNTS.Account_Serial,                 dbo.ACCOUNTS.Account_NameEng,                 dbo.ACCOUNTS.Parent_Account_Code,                 dbo.ACCOUNTS.opening_balance,                 dbo.ACCOUNTS.opening_balance_type,                 dbo.ACCOUNTS.Branch,                 dbo.ACCOUNTS.Sum_account,            dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.DEV_ID_Line_No1,                 dbo.TblNotesTypes.NotesTypeNamee,                 dbo.TransactionTypes.TransactionEnglishName,                 dbo.Notes.NoteSerial1,                 dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.branch_id,                 dbo.TblBranchesData.ActivityTypeId,                 dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.notes_all,                 dbo.TblBranchesData.branch_name,                 dbo.TblBranchesData.branch_namee,                 dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.Posted,                 dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.valuee AS DEV_ValueE,                 dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.currency,                 dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.rate,                 dbo.TblBranchesData.RegionID, CREATE VIEW dbo.RptQryEmpSalesDetails
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Code, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Comm, 
                      dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_ID, QryTransactionsTotal.TransSum, QryTransactionsTotal.TransNet, 
                      QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Serial, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Date, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Type, 
                      QryTransactionsTotal.PaymentType, dbo.TblUsers.UserName, QryTransactionsTotal.TotalAfterTax, SUM(QryTransactionsTotal_1.TotalAfterTax) 
                      AS TotalRe, SUM(dbo.QryPostedTransNotes.Note_Value) AS ReceiptValue
FROM         dbo.QryTransactionsTotal() QryTransactionsTotal INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCustemers ON QryTransactionsTotal.CusID = dbo.TblCustemers.CusID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblUsers ON QryTransactionsTotal.UserID = dbo.TblUsers.UserID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblEmployee ON QryTransactionsTotal.Emp_ID = dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.QryPostedTransNotes ON QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_ID = dbo.QryPostedTransNotes.Transaction_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.QryTransactionsTotal() QryTransactionsTotal_1 ON QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_ID = QryTransactionsTotal_1.ReturnID
WHERE     (QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Type = 2) OR
                      (QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Type = 21)
GROUP BY dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Code, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Comm, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, 
                      QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_ID, QryTransactionsTotal.TransSum, QryTransactionsTotal.TransNet, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Serial, 
                      QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Date, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Type, QryTransactionsTotal.PaymentType, dbo.TblUsers.UserName, 
                      QryTransactionsTotal.TotalAfterTax
ORDER BY QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.RptQryEmpsSales
AS
SELECT     SUM(QryTransactionsTotal.TransSum) AS SumOfTransSum, COUNT(QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_ID) AS TransCount, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID, 
                      dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name
FROM         dbo.TblEmployee INNER JOIN
                      dbo.QryTransactionsTotal() QryTransactionsTotal ON dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID = QryTransactionsTotal.Emp_ID
GROUP BY dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name

CREATE VIEW dbo.RptSupManStock

CREATE VIEW dbo.RptTempPrintStockMovementTree

                      dbo.TempPrintStockMovement.BegainQty, dbo.TempPrintStockMovement.OutQty, dbo.TempPrintStockMovement.InQty,

                      dbo.TblItems.HaveSerial, dbo.TblItems.ItemName, dbo.TblStore.StoreName, dbo.TblItems.ItemCode

                      dbo.Notes ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Notes.Transaction_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.TotalCost
AS
SELECT     dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID, dbo.TblItems.ItemName, SUM(dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity) AS Qty, AVG(dbo.Transaction_Details.Price) AS Prc, 
                      SUM(dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity) * AVG(dbo.Transaction_Details.Price) AS TotCost
FROM         dbo.Transactions INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transaction_Details ON dbo.TblItems.ItemID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID ON 
                      dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblWorkOrdersData ON dbo.Transactions.WorkOrderID = dbo.TblWorkOrdersData.WorkOrderID
WHERE     (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 18)
GROUP BY dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID, dbo.TblItems.ItemName

CREATE VIEW dbo.VIEW10

CREATE VIEW dbo.VIEW11
AS

FROM         dbo.Notes INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.Notes.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID
WHERE     (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 22) AND (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.VIEW12
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT dbo.TblEmpAdvance.Emp_ID, dbo.TblEmpAdvanceDetails.TableID, dbo.TblEmpAdvanceDetails.PartDate, 
                      dbo.TblEmpAdvanceDetails.PartValue, dbo.TblEmpAdvanceDetails.PartNO, dbo.TblEmpAdvanceDetails.AdvanceID, dbo.TblEmpAdvance.AdvanceValue, 
                      dbo.TblEmpAdvanceDetails.Payed
FROM         dbo.TblEmpAdvance INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblEmpAdvanceDetails ON dbo.TblEmpAdvance.AdvanceID = dbo.TblEmpAdvanceDetails.AdvanceID
WHERE     (dbo.TblEmpAdvance.Emp_ID = 9) AND (dbo.TblEmpAdvanceDetails.Payed IS NULL)
