CREATE VIEW dbo.VIEW13
AS
SELECT     dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name, dbo.tblJunkAbsent.Emp_ID, SUM(CONVERT(float, dbo.tblVacancy.Dis_Count)) AS TotaDay
FROM         dbo.TblEmployee INNER JOIN
                      dbo.tblJunkAbsent ON dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID = dbo.tblJunkAbsent.Emp_ID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.tblAbsent ON dbo.tblJunkAbsent.Abs_ID = dbo.tblAbsent.Abs_ID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.tblVacancy ON dbo.tblJunkAbsent.Vac_ID = dbo.tblVacancy.Vac_ID
WHERE     (MONTH(dbo.tblAbsent.Abs_Date) = MONTH(GETDATE())) AND (YEAR(dbo.tblAbsent.Abs_Date) = YEAR(GETDATE()))
GROUP BY dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name, dbo.tblJunkAbsent.Emp_ID

CREATE VIEW dbo.VIEW14
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT QryItemsInventry3.outputValue, QryItemsInventry3.inputvalue, QryItemsInventry3.openingValue, dbo.GetItemCostPrice('01/01/2012', ' 04/04/2013 ',
                       dbo.TblItems.ItemID) AS Cost, dbo.GetItemqtytodate4('5/31/2013', dbo.TblItems.ItemID, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL) AS oldopening, dbo.TblItems.ItemCode, 
                      dbo.TblItems.ItemName, dbo.TblItems.ItemID
FROM         dbo.QryItemsInventry3('1/1/2014', '1/1/2014', 0, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT) QryItemsInventry3 RIGHT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems ON QryItemsInventry3.Item_ID = dbo.TblItems.ItemID

CREATE VIEW dbo.VIEW2
AS

FROM         dbo.QryQuantity('01 /20 / 2007', 0) QryQuantity

CREATE VIEW dbo.VIEW3
AS
SELECT     QryBoxBalance.BoxID, QryBoxBalance.BoxName, QryBoxBalance.Note_Value, dbo.ReportSallingTime.TransNet, 
                      dbo.ReportSallingTime.Transaction_Type
FROM         dbo.QryBoxBalance() QryBoxBalance INNER JOIN

CREATE VIEW dbo.VIEW4
AS
SELECT     dbo.TblItems.ItemID, dbo.TblItems.ItemCode, dbo.TblItems.ItemName, SUM(dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity) AS SumQty, 
                      SUM(dbo.Transaction_Details.Quantity * dbo.Transaction_Details.Price) AS Total, SUM(dbo.Transaction_Details.ItemProfit) AS SumProfit
FROM         dbo.Transaction_Details INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems ON dbo.Transaction_Details.Item_ID = dbo.TblItems.ItemID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Transactions ON dbo.Transaction_Details.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID
WHERE     (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 2)
GROUP BY dbo.TblItems.ItemID, dbo.TblItems.ItemCode, dbo.TblItems.ItemName

CREATE VIEW dbo.VIEW5

                      dbo.Notes.ChqueNum, dbo.Notes.DueDate, dbo.Notes.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial, 
                      dbo.TransactionTypes.TransactionTypeName, dbo.Notes.CusID, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName

                      dbo.TransactionTypes ON dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = dbo.TransactionTypes.Transaction_Type INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCustemers ON dbo.Notes.CusID = dbo.TblCustemers.CusID

                      dbo.TblEmployee.DateExpPasp, dbo.TblEmployee.DateEndPasp, dbo.TblEmployee.BignDateWork, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID,

CREATE VIEW dbo.VIEW9
AS
SELECT     Emp_ID, Emp_Code, Emp_Name, Emp_Comm, CusName, Transaction_ID, TransSum, TransNet, Transaction_Serial, Transaction_Date, 
                      Transaction_Type, PaymentType, UserName, TotalAfterTax, TotalRe
FROM         dbo.RptQryEmpSalesDetails
WHERE     dbo.RptQryEmpSalesDetails.PaymentType = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT     dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Code, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Comm, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, 
                      QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_ID, QryTransactionsTotal.TransSum, QryTransactionsTotal.TransNet, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Serial, 
                      QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Date, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Type, QryTransactionsTotal.PaymentType, dbo.TblUsers.UserName, 
                      QryTransactionsTotal.TotalAfterTax, SUM(QryTransactionsTotal_1.TransNet) AS TotalRe
FROM         dbo.QryPostFullTransactionsNotes INNER JOIN
                      dbo.QryTransactionsTotal() QryTransactionsTotal ON 
                      dbo.QryPostFullTransactionsNotes.Transaction_ID = QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_ID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Notes ON dbo.QryPostFullTransactionsNotes.PostNoteID = dbo.Notes.NoteID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblEmployee ON QryTransactionsTotal.Emp_ID = dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblCustemers ON QryTransactionsTotal.CusID = dbo.TblCustemers.CusID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblUsers ON QryTransactionsTotal.UserID = dbo.TblUsers.UserID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.QryTransactionsTotal() QryTransactionsTotal_1 ON QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_ID = QryTransactionsTotal_1.ReturnID
WHERE     QryTransactionsTotal.PaymentType = 1 AND (QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Type = 2 OR
                      QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Type = 21)
GROUP BY dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Code, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Comm, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName, 
                      QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_ID, QryTransactionsTotal.TransSum, QryTransactionsTotal.TransNet, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Serial, 
                      QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Date, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Type, QryTransactionsTotal.PaymentType, dbo.TblUsers.UserName, 
                      QryTransactionsTotal.TotalAfterTax

CREATE VIEW dbo.ViewEmpComm1
AS

                      QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_ID, QryTransactionsTotal.TransSum, QryTransactionsTotal.TransNet, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Serial, 
                      QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Date, QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_Type, QryTransactionsTotal.PaymentType, dbo.TblUsers.UserName,

FROM         dbo.QryPostFullTransactionsNotes INNER JOIN

                      dbo.QryPostFullTransactionsNotes.Transaction_ID = QryTransactionsTotal.Transaction_ID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.Notes ON dbo.QryPostFullTransactionsNotes.PostNoteID = dbo.Notes.NoteID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblEmployee ON QryTransactionsTotal.Emp_ID = dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID INNER JOIN

GROUP BY dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_ID, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Code, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Name, dbo.TblEmployee.Emp_Comm, dbo.TblCustemers.CusName,

CREATE VIEW dbo.voucher_all
AS

                      dbo.DOUBLE_ENTREY_VOUCHERS.*

CREATE VIEW dbo.VVX
AS
SELECT     TOP 100 PERCENT Transaction_ID, COUNT(Transaction_ID) AS CountX
FROM         (SELECT     dbo.Notes.NoteID, dbo.Notes.NoteDate, dbo.Notes.NoteType, dbo.Notes.Note_Value, dbo.Notes.Remark, dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxID, 
                                              dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxName, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Serial, dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type, 
                                              dbo.Transactions.PaymentType, dbo.ACCOUNTS.Account_Code AS BoxAccountCode, dbo.TblCustemers.Account_Code_As_Client, 
                                              dbo.TblCustemers.Account_Code_As_Supplier
                        FROM         dbo.Notes LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                              dbo.TblBoxesData ON dbo.Notes.BoxID = dbo.TblBoxesData.BoxID INNER JOIN
                                              dbo.Transactions ON dbo.Notes.Transaction_ID = dbo.Transactions.Transaction_ID INNER JOIN
                                              dbo.TblCustemers ON dbo.Transactions.CusID = dbo.TblCustemers.CusID LEFT OUTER JOIN
                                              dbo.ACCOUNTS ON dbo.TblBoxesData.Account_ID = dbo.ACCOUNTS.Account_ID
                        WHERE     (dbo.Notes.NoteType = 0 OR
                                              dbo.Notes.NoteType = 1 OR
                                              dbo.Notes.NoteType = 2) AND (dbo.Transactions.Transaction_Type = 2)) xTable
GROUP BY Transaction_ID
ORDER BY Transaction_ID

FROM         dbo.TblCustemers INNER JOIN
                      dbo.MaintenanceType INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblMaintenece ON dbo.MaintenanceType.TypeID = dbo.TblMaintenece.MType ON dbo.TblCustemers.CusID = dbo.TblMaintenece.CusID INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblItems INNER JOIN
                      dbo.TblMainteneceDetails ON dbo.TblItems.ItemID = dbo.TblMainteneceDetails.ItemID ON 
                      dbo.TblMaintenece.MaintananceID = dbo.TblMainteneceDetails.MaintananceID
WHERE     (dbo.TblItems.HaveSerial = 1)

CREATE VIEW dbo.ءءءءءءءءءءءءءءءءءءءءءءءءءءءء
AS
SELECT     dbo.MEMBER_CHILD.*, MEMBER_TITLE AS Expr1
FROM         dbo.MEMBER_CHILD
WHERE     (MEMBER_TITLE <> N'جد' AND MEMBER_TITLE <> N'جده')

CREATE VIEW dbo.تجربة
AS
SELECT     dbo.Shipments_details.*
FROM         dbo.Shipments_details
